title: Duas to be recited during the day on each day of the month of Ramadan

duas.title: Duas and Tasbih to be recited during the day in the month of Ramadan
Ya DhaAlladhi
duas.description: In his book of ‘al-Muqni`ah’, Shaykh al-Mufid has narrated on the authority of the trustworthy master scholar, `Ali ibn Mahziyar, that Imam Muhammad al-Taqi (peace be upon him) said that it is recommended to say the following supplication as many times as possible during the month of Ramadan on days and nights from the beginning of the month up to its end:

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا ٱلَّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: ya dha alladhi kana qabla kulli shay'in
segments.translation: O He Who has existed before all things,
then created all things,

segments.transliteration: thumma yabqa wa yafna kullu shay'in
segments.translation: and then stays while all things vanish!

segments.arabic: يَا ذَا ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ
segments.transliteration: ya dha alladhi laysa kamithlihi shay'un
segments.translation: O He Whose like is not found at all!

segments.arabic: وَيَا ذَا ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ ٱلْعُلَىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa ya dha alladhi laysa fi alssamawati al`ula
segments.translation: O He neither in the highest heavens
nor in the lowest layers of the earth,

segments.transliteration: wa la fawqahunna wa la tahtahunna
segments.translation: nor above them, nor beneath them,

segments.transliteration: wa la baynahunna ilahun yu`badu ghayruhu
segments.translation: nor there is between them any god that is worshipped save Him.

segments.arabic: لَكَ ٱلْحَمْدُ حَمْداً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهِ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: laka alhamdu hamdan la yaqwa `ala ihsa'ihi illa anta
segments.translation: To You be the praise that none can count save You.
So, please bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: صَلاةً لاَ يَقْوَىٰ عَلَىٰ إِحْصَائِهَا إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: salatan la yaqwa `ala ihsa'iha illa anta
segments.translation: with blessings that none can count save You.

duas.reference: Muqnicah, 320, b 13. Iqbal, 187-188, thence in Bihar, xcv, 147. Kafami’s Misbah, 623. Balad, 226. A shorter version is given in Tawhid, 47, b 2, h 11, thence in Bihar, iii. 285, b 12, h 5.

duas.title: Dua An taj`ala
duas.description:
Day and Night Dua from Imam Sadiq (as)
Imam al-sadiq (a.s) is reported to have instructed to say the following supplication every day/night in Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: O Allah :I beseech You that You,

segments.arabic: مِنَ الأَمْرِ الْمَحْتُومِ فِي الأَمْرِ الْحَكِيمِ
segments.transliteration: min al-amri almahtumi fi al-amri alhakimi
segments.translation: while taking decisions and rendering possible things and events decisively

segments.arabic: مِنَ الْقَضَاءِ الَّذِي لا يُرَدُّ وَلا يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqada'i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu
segments.translation: (decisions which can not be changed or bypassed),

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ الْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami
segments.translation: write my name in the list of those pilgrims of Your Holy House
whose pilgrimage receives Your approval,
whose efforts are appreciated,
whose sins are forgiven,
whose wrongdoings are overlooked;

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: that You, while making decisions and rendering possible things and events;

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي فِي خَيْرٍ وَعَافِيَةٍ،
segments.translation: make possible for me long life, goodness, welfare,
and enough means of livelihood,

segments.transliteration: wa taj`alani mimman tantasiru bihi lidinika
segments.translation: and let me be like him whom You helps with Your Religion;
not substituting any other in my place.

duas.title: Dua hadha shahr
duas.description:
Allahumma Hadha Shahru Ramadan
<hr>
It is recommended to say the following supplication that is mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid Ibn Tawus:

segments.translation: O Allah, this is the month of Ramadan
in which You revealed the Qur'an,

segments.arabic: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَٱلفُرْقَانِ
segments.transliteration: hudan lilnnasi wa bayyinatin min alhuda walfurqani
segments.translation: a guidance for humankind and clear proofs of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong).
This is the month of observing fasting.
This is the month of acts of worship.
This the month of turning to You (in penitence).
This is the month of repentance.
This is the month of forgiveness and mercy.

segments.arabic: وَهٰذَا شَهْرُ ٱلْعِتْقِ مِنَ ٱلنَّارِ وَٱلْفَوْزِ بِٱلْجَنَّةِ
segments.transliteration: wa hadha shahru al`itqi min alnnari walfawzi biljannati
segments.translation: This is the moth of release from Hellfire and winning Paradise.

segments.transliteration: wa hadha shahrun fihi laylatu alqadri
segments.translation: This is the month in which there is the Destiny Night,

segments.arabic: ٱلَّتِي هِيَ خَيْرٌ مِنَ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
segments.transliteration: allati hiya khayrun min alfi shahrin
segments.translation: which is better than one thousand months.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fasalli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
help me observe fasting and do acts of worship during it,

segments.transliteration: wa sallimhu li wa sallimni fihi
segments.translation: keep it upright for me, keep me safe during it,
help me observe it with the best of Your help,

segments.arabic: وَوَفِّقْنِي فِيهِ لِطَاعَتِكَ وَطَاعَةِ رَسُولِكَ وَأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa waffiqni fihi lita`atika wa ta`ati rasulika wa awliya'ika
segments.translation: make me succeed in doing acts of obedience to You, to Your Prophet, and Your intimate servants
upon whom be Your blessings.

segments.arabic: وَفَرِّغْنِي فِيهِ لِعِبَادَتِكَ وَدُعَائِكَ وَتِلاوَةِ كِتَابِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa farrighni fihi li`ibadatika wa du`a'ika wa tilawati kitabika
segments.translation: Make me devote myself to acts of worship to You, to praying You, and to reciting Your Book,
increase its blessings for me,
confer upon me with good health during it,
make my body healthy during it,
expand my sustenance during it,
save me from whatever aggrieves me during it,
respond to my prayers during it,
and make me attain my hope during it.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأَذْهِبْ عَنِّي فِيهِ ٱلنُّعَاسَ وَٱلْكَسَلَ وَٱلسَّأْمَةَ
segments.transliteration: wa adhhib `anni fihi alnnu`asa walkasala walssa'mata
segments.translation: remove from me during it drowsiness, lethargy, laziness,
weariness, hardheartedness, inattentiveness, and carelessness.
Put aside from me during it illnesses, sicknesses,
grievances, sorrows,
ailments, diseases,
wrongdoings, and sins.
Send away from me during it evil, indecency,
fatigue, ordeals,
tiredness, and suffering.
Verily, You are the Hearer of prayers.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa a`idhni fihi min alshshaytani alrrajimi
segments.translation: and protect me during it from Satan the cursed,

segments.transliteration: wa hamzihi wa lamzihi wa nafthihi wa nafkhihi
segments.translation: his sting, his slander, his devilry,

segments.transliteration: wa waswasatihi wa tathbitihi wa batshihi wa kaydihi
segments.translation: his evil inspirations, his frustration, his obstinacy, his trickeries,

segments.transliteration: wa makrihi wa haba'ilihi wa khuda`ihi wa amaniyyihi
segments.translation: his deceptions, his traps, his scams, his false hopes,

segments.transliteration: wa ghururihi wa fitnatihi wa sharakihi wa ahzabihi
segments.translation: his vanities, his seductions, his ruses, his allies,

segments.transliteration: wa atba`ihi wa ashya`ihi wa awliya'ihi wa shuraka'ihi
segments.translation: his followers, his fans, his supporters, his partners,
and all his snares.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and bestow upon us with the observance of fasting, acts of worship,

segments.transliteration: wa bulugha al-amali fihi wa fi qiyamihi
segments.translation: attainment of our hopes during it, by means of doing acts of worship in it,
accomplishment of that which brings about Your pleasure

segments.transliteration: sabran wahtisaban wa imanan wa yaqinan
segments.translation: by means of steadfastness, acting for Your sake, faith and certitude.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ تَقَبَّلْ ذٰلِكَ مِنِّي بِٱلأَضْعَافِ ٱلْكَثِيرَةِ
segments.transliteration: thumma taqabbal dhalika minni bil-ad`afi alkathirati
segments.translation: Then (please) admit all that from me with manifold rewards
and great gifts.
O Lord of the worlds!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and grant me (the opportunity to go on) Hajj, `Umrah,
hard work, painstakingness,
power, activity,
turning to You, repentance,
success, seeking Your nearness,
admitted good-doing, desire (for You), fear (from You),
submission (to You), meekness,
tenderness, sincere intention,
truthfulness,
dread from You,
hope for You,
reliance upon You,
trust in You,
and abstention from committing that which You have deemed unlawful,
along with decent speaking,
admitted efforts,
elevated deeds,
and responded prayers.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَحُلْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ شَيْءٍ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la tahul bayni wa bayna shay'in min dhalika
segments.translation: Do not let anything intervene between me and any of these matters,
such as an accidental event, disease,

segments.transliteration: wa la hammin wa la ghammin
segments.translation: grief, unhappiness,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ سُقْمٍ وَلاَ غَفْلَةٍ وَلاَ نِسْيَانٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la suqmin wa la ghaflatin wa la nisyanin
segments.translation: ailment, inadvertence, or oblivion;

segments.transliteration: bal biltta`ahudi walttahaffuzi laka wa fika
segments.translation: rather, (help me do all that) with observance, carefulness to You and for Your sake,

segments.transliteration: walrri`aiyati lihaqqika walwafa'i bi`ahdika wa wa`dika
segments.translation: adherence to that which is incumbent upon me towards You, and fulfillment of my covenant and promise to You.
(let all that be) in the name of Your mercy, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱقْسِمْ لِي فِيهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا تَقْسِمُهُ لِعِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّالِحِينَ
segments.transliteration: waqsim li fihi afdala ma taqsimuhu li`ibadika alssalihina
segments.translation: decide for me during this month the best of that which You decide for Your righteous servants,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنِي فِيهِ أَفْضَلَ مَا تُعْطِي أَوْلِيَاءَكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tini fihi afdala ma tu`ti awlya'aka almuqarrabina
segments.translation: and give me during it the most favorable of that which You give to Your intimate and favorite servants;
such as mercy, forgiveness, kindness, responding (of prayers),
pardon, perpetual forgiveness, good health, continuous wellbeing,
release from Hellfire, winning Paradise,
and the goodness of this worldly life and the Next World.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and cause my prayers during this month to reach You,

segments.transliteration: wa rahmataka wa khayraka ilayya fihi nazilan
segments.translation: Your mercy and goodness during it to reach me,
my deed to be accepted (by You),
my efforts during it to be praiseworthy,
and my sins during it to be forgiven
so that my share (of Your awards) shall be the most abundant,
and my portion the most copious.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and guide me to observe the Destiny Night adequately,

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ أَفْضَلِ حَالٍ تُحِبُّ أَنْ يَكُونَ عَلَيْهَا أَحَدٌ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ وَأَرْضَاهَا لَكَ
segments.transliteration: `ala afdali halin tuhibbu an yakuna `alayha ahadun min awliya'ika wa ardaha laka
segments.translation: being in the most favorable and most pleased state that You would like to notice from any of Your intimate servants.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْعَلْهَا لِي خَيْراً مِنَ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
segments.transliteration: thumm ij`alha li khayran min alfi shahrin
segments.translation: Then, decide it to be better for me that one thousand months,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي فِيهَا أَفْضَلَ مَا رَزَقْتَ أَحَداً مِمَّنْ بَلَّغْتَهُ إِيَّاهَا وَأَكْرَمْتَهُ بِهَا
segments.transliteration: warzuqni fiha afdala ma razaqta ahadan mimman ballaghtahu iyyaha wa akramtahu biha
segments.translation: confer upon me during this night the best conferrals that You ever confer upon any one whom You guide to attain it and whom You honor during it,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي فِيهَا مِنْ عُتَقَائِكَ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ
segments.translation: include me at this night it with those whom You release from Hell
whom You manumit from Hellfire

segments.transliteration: wa su`ada'i khalqika bimaghfiratika wa ridwanika
segments.translation: and with those of Your creatures who are happy due to Your forgiveness and satisfaction (that reach them).
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنَا فِي شَهْرِنَا هٰذَا ٱلجِدَّ وَٱلإِجْتِهَادَ
segments.transliteration: warzuqna fi shahrina hadha aljidda walijtihada
segments.translation: and grant us during this month hard working, exactness,
power, activeness,
and whatever You like and please.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ ٱلفَجْرِ وَلَيَالٍ عَشْرٍ وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba alfajri wa layalin `ashrin walshshaf`i walwatri
segments.translation: O Allah, the Lord of the Dawn, the Ten Nights, the Even and the Odd,

segments.arabic: وَرَبَّ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ وَمَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ ٱلْقُرْآنِ
segments.transliteration: wa rabba shahri ramadana wa ma anzalta fihi min alqur'ani
segments.translation: the Lord of the month of Ramadan and the Qur'an that You have revealed during it,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila wa `izra'ila
segments.translation: the Lord of (Archangels) Gabriel, Michael, Seraph, and `Izra’il,
as well as all the Favorite Angels,
the Lord of (Prophets) Abraham, Ishmael,
Isaac, and Jacob,
the Lord of Moses and Jesus,
as well as all the Prophets and Messengers,
and the Lord of Muhammad, the seal of the Prophets,
may Your blessings be upon him and upon them all.
I beseech You in the name of their duty towards You Your duty towards them,

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ لَمَّا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa bihaqqika al`azimi lamma sallayta `alayhi wa alihi wa `alayhim ajma`ina
segments.translation: and in the name of the great duty towards You to bless him and his Household and all of them,
to take a merciful look at me

segments.arabic: تَرْضَىٰ بِهَا عَنِّي رِضَىً لاَ سَخَطَ عَلَيَّ بَعْدَهُ أَبَداً
segments.transliteration: tarda biha `anni ridan la sakhata `alayya ba`dahu Abadan
segments.translation: due to which You be pleased with me so perfectly that You never be irate with me after that,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطَيْتَنِي جَمِيعَ سُؤْلِي وَرَغْبَتِي وَأُمْنِيَتِي وَإِرَادَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`taytani jami`a su'li wa raghbati wa umniyati wa iradati
segments.translation: to grant me all my requests, desires, hopes, and needs,

segments.transliteration: wa sarafta `anni ma akrahu wa ahdharu
segments.translation: to ward off all that which I despise and try to avoid

segments.arabic: وَأَخَافُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِي وَمَا لاَ أَخَافُ
segments.transliteration: wa akhafu `ala nafsi wa ma la akhafu
segments.translation: and all that which I fear for myself and all that which I do not fear,

segments.transliteration: wa `an ahli wa mali wa ikhwani wa dhurriyyati
segments.translation: and to do the same to my family members, my property, my brethren and my offspring.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمُّ إِلَيْكَ فَرَرْنَا مِنْ ذُنُوبِنَا فَآوِنَا تَائِبِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ilayka fararna min dhunubina fa'awina ta'ibina
segments.translation: O Allah, to You are we running from our sins; so (please do) shelter us as we are repentant,
accept our repentance as we are seeking Your forgiveness,
forgive us as we are seeking Your protection,
protect us as we are seeking Your aid,
aid us as we are surrendering to You,
never disappoint us as we are fearful of You,
secure us as we are desiring for You,
accept our intercession as we are begging You,

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِنَا إِنَّكَ سَمِيعُ ٱلدُّعَاءِ قرِيبٌ مُجِيبٌ
segments.transliteration: wa a`tina innaka sami`u alddu`a'i qribun mujibun
segments.translation: and grant us (what we hope) as You are verily the Hearer of prayers, the Nigh, and the Responding.
O Allah, You are my Lord and I am Your servant,

segments.transliteration: wa ahaqqu man sa'ala al`abdu rabbahu
segments.translation: and it is conventional that a servant begs from his Lord.

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَسْأَلِ ٱلْعِبَادُ مِثْلَكَ كَرَماً وَجُوداً
segments.transliteration: wa lam yas'ali al`ibadu mithlaka karaman wa judan
segments.translation: All Your servants have never begged any one who is as generous and magnanimous as You are.
O center of the complaints of the beseechers!
O ultimate goal of the needs of the desirers!
O Aide of the seekers of aid!
O Responding to the prayers of the distressed ones!
O Shelter of the fugitives!
O Helper of the seekers of help!
O Cherisher of the enfeebled ones!
O Reliever of the grievances of the aggrieved ones!
O Releaser of the agonies of the distressed ones!
O Reliever of the enormous calamities!

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rahmanu ya rahimu
segments.translation: O Allah! O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
(Please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
forgive my sins, my defects,

segments.transliteration: wa isa'ati wa zulmi wa jurmi
segments.translation: my offenses, my wrongdoing, my felonies,
and my extravagance in my affairs,
grant me out of Your favors and mercy,
for none possesses these two save You,
pardon me,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِي كُلَّ مَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
segments.transliteration: waghfir li kulla ma salafa min dhunubi
segments.translation: forgive all my past sins,
save me from sinning in the rest of my lifetime,
cover me as well as my parents,

segments.transliteration: wa waladi wa qarabati wa ahli huzanati
segments.translation: my children, my relatives, my friends,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ كَانَ مِنِّي بِسَبِيلٍ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَاتِ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa man kana minni bisabilin min almu'minina walmu'minati fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: and all those who relate to me from the believing men and women in this worldly life and the life to come.
Verily, all that is managed by You alone
and You are verily the Liberal in forgiving.
So, my Master, do not disappoint me,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَرُدَّ دُعَائِي وَلاَ يَدِي إِلَىٰ نَحْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa la tarudda du`a'i wa la yadi ila nahri
segments.translation: do not reject my prayer, and do not let me down;

segments.arabic: حَتَّىٰ تَفْعَلَ ذٰلِكَ بِي وَتَسْتَجِيبَ لِي جَمِيعَ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta taf`ala dhalika bi wa tastajiba li jami`a ma sa'altuka
segments.translation: rather, (please) do all that to me, respond to me in all that which I have asked from You,
and increase Your favor upon me,
because You verily have power over all things
and for You do we desire.
O Allah, Yours are the Most Excellent Names,
the Most Elevated Examples,
every greatness, and all bounties.
I thus beseech You by Your Name:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.

segments.arabic: إِنْ كُنْتَ قَضَيْتَ فِي هٰذِهِ ٱللَّيْلَةِ
segments.transliteration: in kunta qadayta fi hadhihi allaylati
segments.translation: If you have decided at this night,
during which the angels and the Holy Spirit are allowed to descend,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
add my name to the (list of the) happy ones,
add my soul to the martyrs,
elevate my good doings exaltedly,
decide my ill deeds to be forgiven,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَهَبَ لِي يَقِيناً تُبَاشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبِي
segments.transliteration: wa an tahaba li yaqinan tubashiru bihi qalbi
segments.translation: grant me conviction with which You fill in my heart,
faith free of doubt,
satisfaction with that which You decide for me,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنِي فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي ٱلآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
segments.transliteration: wa atini fi alddunya hasanatan wa fi al-akhirati hasanatan
segments.translation: grant me good in this worldly life and good in the Next World,
and save me from the Fire of Hell.

segments.arabic: وَإِنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ قَضَيْتَ فِي هٰذِهِ ٱللَّيْلَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa in lam takun qadayta fi hadhihi allaylati
segments.translation: And if You have not decided at this night,
during which the angels and the Holy Spirit are allowed to descend,
then (please) postpone Your decisions about me to that night,
confer upon me during it with remembering You, showing gratitude to You,
doing acts of obedience to You, and worshipping You in the best manner.

segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: And (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
with Your most favorable blessings, O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
O One and Only! the Besought of all!
O Lord of Muhammad!
(please) revenge on this day for Muhammad and for the pious ones from his offspring,
eradicate all of their enemies,
put them all under Your reprimand,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تَدَعْ عَلَىٰ ظَهْرِ ٱلأَرْضِ مِنْهُمْ أَحَداً
segments.transliteration: wa la tada` `ala zahri al-ardi minhum ahadan
segments.translation: do not leave anyone of them to live on this earth,
and never forgive them.
O most excellent Companion!
O Heir of the Prophets!
You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy,
the Commencer, the brilliant Maker,
there is none like You,
You are the Eternal Who never omits anything,
are the Ever-living Who never dies,
on each day, You have a certain state.
You are the Heir of Muhammad,
the Supporter of Muhammad,
and the Selector of Muhammad.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَنْصُرَ وَصِيَّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَخَلِيفَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka an tansura wasiyi muhammadin wa khalifata muhammadin
segments.translation: I beseech You to give victory to the successor and representative of Muhammad,
the Imam who shall appear with justice among the successors of Muhammad,
may Your blessings be upon him and upon them.
(Please) turn Your victory toward them.
O He but Whom there is no god!
I beseech You in the name of that there is no god but You,
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
allow me to join them in this worldly life as well as the Next World

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْ عَاقِبَةَ أَمْرِي إِلَىٰ غُفْرَانِكَ وَرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: waj`al `aqibata amri ila ghufranika wa rahmatika
segments.translation: and allow all my affairs to end up with Your forgiveness and mercy.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: وَكَذٰلِكَ نَسَبْتَ نَفْسَكَ يَا سَيِّدِي بِٱللُّطْفِ
segments.transliteration: wa kadhalika nasabta nafsaka ya sayyidi billutfi
segments.translation: O my Master, You have ascribed the feature of kindness to Yourself.
Yes, indeed! You are truly kind.
So, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
and treat me kindly as You like.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي ٱلْحَجَّ وَٱلْعُمْرَةَ فِي عَامِنَا هٰذَا
segments.translation: grant me (the opportunity to go on) Hajj and `Umrah in this year,

segments.arabic: وَتَطَوَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِجَمِيعِ حَوَائِجِي لِلآخِرَةِ وَٱلدُّنْيَا
segments.transliteration: wa tatawwal `alayya bijami`i hawa'iji lil-akhirati walddunya
segments.translation: confer upon me with the favor of settling all my needs for the Next World and this worldly life.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi
segments.translation: I implore for the forgiveness of Allah, my Lord, and I repent before Him.
Surely, my Lord is Nigh and Responding.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi
segments.translation: I implore for Allah’s forgiveness, my Lord, and I repent before Him,
Surely, my Lord is Merciful, Loving.

segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha rabbi wa atubu ilayhi
segments.translation: I implore for Allah’s forgiveness, my Lord, and I repent before Him.
He is surely All-forgiving.
O Allah, (please do) forgive me.
You are verily the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّي عَمِلْتُ سُوءاً وَظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِي
segments.transliteration: rabbi inni `amiltu su'an wa zalamtu nafsi
segments.translation: O my Lord, I have committed ill deeds and wronged myself.

segments.arabic: فَٱغْفِرْ لِي إِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ ٱلذُّنُوبَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: faghfir li innahu la yaghfiru aldhdhunuba illa anta
segments.translation: So (please) forgive me, because none can forgive sins save You.

segments.arabic: أَسْتَغْفِرُ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِي لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ
segments.transliteration: astaghfiru allaha alladhi la ilaha illa huwa
segments.translation: I implore for Allah’s forgiveness save Whom there is no god,
the Ever-living, the Self-Subsistent, the Indulgent, the All-great,
the Noble, the forgiver of fatal sins,
and I repent before Him.
I implore for Allah’s forgiveness.
Allah is verily Forgiver, Merciful.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru
segments.translation: to decide within the decisions that You make,

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلأَمْرِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ٱلْمَحْتُومِ فِي لَيْلَةِ ٱلْقَدْرِ
segments.transliteration: min al-amri al`azimi almahtumi fi laylati alqadri
segments.translation: from the great, inevitable affair at the Destiny Night,

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْقَضَاءِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُرَدُّ وَلاَ يُبَدَّلُ
segments.transliteration: min alqada'i alladhi la yuraddu wa la yubaddalu
segments.translation: within the decision that is neither rejected nor altered,

segments.arabic: أَنْ تَكْتُبَنِي مِنْ حُجَّاجِ بَيْتِكَ ٱلْحَرَامِ
segments.transliteration: an taktubani min hujjaji baytika alharami
segments.translation: to write my name with the pilgrims of Your Holy House,
whose Hajj is admitted,
whose efforts are praiseworthy,
whose sins are forgiven,
and whose offenses are pardoned,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْ تَجْعَلَ فِيمَا تَقْضِي وَتُقَدِّرُ أَنْ تُطِيلَ عُمْرِي
segments.transliteration: wa an taj`ala fima taqdi wa tuqaddiru an tutila `umri
segments.translation: to decide among the decisions that You make to grant me long lifetime,
expand my sustenance,
help me fulfill my trusts and settle my debts,
and respond to me, O Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: اَللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْ لِي مِنْ أَمْرِي فَرَجاً وَمَخْرَجاً
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li min amri farajan wa makhrajan
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) make for me relief and an outlet,

segments.arabic: وَٱرْزُقْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَسِبُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ أَحْتَسِبُ
segments.transliteration: warzuqni min haythu ahtasibu wa min haythu la ahtasibu
segments.translation: provide for me from whence I expect and from whence I do not expect,

segments.arabic: وَٱحْرُسْنِي مِنْ حَيْثُ أَحْتَرِسُ وَمِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ أَحْتَرِسُ
segments.transliteration: wahrusni min haythu ahtarisu wa min haythu la ahtarisu
segments.translation: guard me from when I take precautions and from whence I do not take precautions,

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَسَلِّمْ كَثِيراً
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin wa sallim kathiran
segments.translation: and send plentiful blessings and benedictions to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad.

duas.reference: Muqnicah, 332-341. Tusi’s Misbah. 610-616. Tahdhib, iii, 111, Iqbal, 89-93. Kafcami’s Misbah, 618. Balad, 223.??

duas.title: Allahumma arina fihi
duas.description: Beseech Allah (swt) a lot for bestowing the grace for appreciation of the Night of Power (Lailatul-Qadr) and Night of Fitr, and during days and nights should pray a lot for the Imam of the Age - Imam Mahdi [ajtfs], by reciting the following:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَرِنا فِيهِ وَفِي أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ وَشِیعَتِهِ وَرَعيّتِهِ وَعَامَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma arina fihi wa fi ahli baytihi wa shi‘atihi wa ra‘iyyatihi wa ‘ammatihi
segments.translation: O Allah, show us in him, his family, his followers, his people, and the general public

segments.arabic: ا مَا يَأمُلُ وَفِي أعْدائِهِ مَا يَحْذَرُوْنَ
segments.transliteration: Ama ya’mulu wa fi a‘da’ihi ma yahdharun
segments.translation: What he hopes for, and in his enemies what they fear
Bestow upon us obedience to him and his pleasure

segments.transliteration: Walhiqna bashi‘atihi al-muqarrabin wa awliya’ihi as-sabiqin
segments.translation: And join us with his close followers and his preceding allies
And send blessings upon him and his pure forefathers
With all Your blessings, O Most Merciful of the merciful

duas.title: Allahhumma Inni Aduka
duas.description: Both Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid ibn Tawus have recommended saying the following supplication throughout the days of the month of Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ بَهَائِكَ بِأَبْهَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min baha’ika bi-abhahu
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your brilliance that beautifies,
and all Your glories are radiantly brilliant,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your glories.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَلالِكَ بِأَجَلّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min jalalika bi-ajallhi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your majesty that gives grandeur,
and all Your majestic powers are strongly sublime;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your powers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ جَمَالِكَ بِأَجْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min jamalika bi-ajmalihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your refined good that makes more handsome,
and all Your refinements are gracefully beautiful;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your beauties.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَظَمَتِكَ بِأَعْظَمِهَا
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your greatness that makes great,
and all Your powers are extensively important;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your influences.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ نُورِكَ بِأَنْوَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min nurika bi-anwarihi
segments.translation: O Allah I beseech You to give me from Your light that enlightens,
and all Your enlightenments are luminously bright;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your lights.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ بِأَوْسَعِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min rahmatika bi-awsa`iha
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your mercy that gives much,
and all Your kind leniencies are plenteously many,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your compassions.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَمَالِكَ بِأَكْمَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min kamalika bi-akmalihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your perfection that brings to fullness,
and all Your perfections are total and whole,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your perfections.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ كَلِمَاتِكَ بِأَتَمّهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min kalimatika bi-atammha
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Words that elaborate and conclude;
and all Your words are complete and perfect;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Words.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ أَسْمَائِكَ بِأَكْبَرِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min asma’ika bi-akbariha
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Names that make great,
and all Your Names are important;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Names:

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِزّتِكَ بِأَعَزّهَا
segments.translation: O Allah I beseech You to give me from Your authority that surpasses in honor and power,
and all Your authorities are rare and supreme,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your authorities.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَشِيئَتِكَ بِأَمْضَاهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mashi-atika bi-amdaha
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Will that (simultaneously) takes effect,
and all Your wills are (at once) executed;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your wills.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قُدْرَتِكَ بِالْقُدْرَةِ الّتِي اسْتَطَلْتَ بِهَا عَلَى كُلّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min qudratika bilqudrati allaty astatalta biha `ala kulli shay‘in
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your that omnipotence which controls everything,
and at all events Your omnipotence dominates.
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your all-embracing omnipotence.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عِلْمِكَ بِأَنْفَذِهِ
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Wisdom that pierces through and enforces,
and Your Wisdom is altogether effective,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your Wisdom.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ قَوْلِكَ بِأَرْضَاهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min qawlika bi-ardahu
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your promise which always is fulfilled,
and all Your promises are kept and fulfilled,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your promises.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَسَائِلِكَ بِأَحَبّهَا إلَيْكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min masa’ilika bi-ahabbha ilayka
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your Channels which are most dear to You,
and all that which is dear to You is most desirable,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your Channels.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ شَرَفِكَ بِأَشْرَفِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min sharafika bi-ashrafihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your distinctions that vie in glory,
and all Your distinctions are noble;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your distinctions.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ سُلْطَانِكَ بِأَدْوَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min sultanika bi-adwamihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your sovereignty which lasts and continues forever,
and for all times Your sovereignty is everlasting;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your absolute sovereignty.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مُلْكِكَ بِأَفْخَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mulkika bi-afkharihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your kingdom that surpasses in glory and nobility,
and in reality Your kingdom alone is the most celebrated and magnificent;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your unlimited kingdom.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَلاءِكَ بِأَعْلاهُ
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your highest height that exalts,
and Your eminence is altogether sublime;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of Your highest sublimeness.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ مَنّكَ بِأَقْدَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min mannka bi-aqdamihi
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your bounties which always move ahead, come in advance,
and all Your bounties are eternal,
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your bounties.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ آيَاتِكَ بِأَعْجَبِهَا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min ayatika bi-a`jabiha
segments.translation: O Allah I ask You to give me from Your signs; the most wonderful of them,
and all Your signs are wonderful;
O Allah I beseech You in the name of all Your signs,

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ بِأَفْضَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min fadlika bi-afdalihi
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the best of Your favors;
and all Your favors are excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole favor.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ بِأَعَمّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min rizqika bi-a`ammhi
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most widespread of Your sustenance;
and all Your sustenance is widespread.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your whole sustenance.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِأَهْنَئِهِ
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from the most wholesome of Your bestowal;
and Your entire bestowal is wholesome.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire bestowal.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِكَ بِأَعْجَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min khayrika bi-a`jalihi
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from Your most instant welfare;
and Your entire welfare is instant.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire welfare.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ إحْسَانِكَ بِأَحْسَنِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka min ihsanika bi-ahsanihi
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me from You most excellent benevolence;
and Your entire benevolence is excellent.
O Allah: I beseech You in the name of Your entire benevolence.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bima tujibuny bihi hina as’aluka
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all that through which You may respond to me if I beseech You;
therefore, (please do) respond to me, O Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bima tujibuny bihi hina as’aluka
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all that through which You may respond to me if I beseech You;
Yes, I have besought You, O Allah.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ بِمَا أَنْتَ فِيهِ مِنَ الشُّؤونِ وَالْجَبَرُوتِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma bima anta fihi mina alshshu’uni wal-jabaruti
segments.translation: O Allah: (I beseech You) in the name of all authorities and powers that You enjoy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِشَأنِكَ وَجَبَروتِكَ كُلِّها
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bisha’nika wa jabarutika kulliha
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of all of Your authorities and powers.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bima tujibuny bihi hina as’aluka bih
segments.translation: O Allah: I ask You to give me whereby You gives answer to my supplication whenever I turn to You,
So, (please) respond to me, O Allah.
Send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah: send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad
and resurrect me abiding by the believing in You,
giving credence to Your Messenger,

segments.arabic: وَالوِلايَةِ لِعَلِيّ بْنِ أَبِي طَالِبٍ عَلَيْهِما السَّلامُ
segments.transliteration: wal-wilayati li`aliyyi bni aby talibin `alayhima alssalamu
segments.translation: being faithful to `Ali ibn Abu-Talib—peace be upon both of them;
being following the (Divinely commissioned) leadership of the Imams from the Household of Muhammad
And disavowing their enemy.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي قَدْ رَضِيتُ يَا رَبّي بِذلِكَ
segments.transliteration: fa’inni qad raditu ya rabby bidhlika
segments.translation: My Lord, I have accepted such.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah: send blessings on Muhammad and the Family of Muhammad
And I beseech You for the best of the goodness: Your pleasure and Paradise;

segments.arabic: وَأعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ الشَّرِّ: سَخَطِكَ وَالنّارِ
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika min sharri alshsharri sakhatika wannari
segments.translation: And I seek Your protection against the most evil of the evil: Your wrath and Hellfire.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;

segments.arabic: وَاحْفَظْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ مُصِيبَةٍ وَكُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: wahfazhniy min kulli musiibatin wakulli baliyyatin,
segments.translation: And safeguard me against all misfortunes and all ordeals
And all punishments
And all seditious matters
And all trials
And all evils
And all tribulations
And all misfortunes
And all catastrophes

segments.arabic: نَزَلَتْ أو تَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ إلى الأرْضِ في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: nazalat aw tanzilu mina alssama‘i ili alardi fy hdhihi alssa`ati,
segments.translation: That have already or will ascend from the heavens to the earth at this very hour,
And at this night
And on this day
And in this month
And in this year.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah: (please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
And decide for me a portion from all pleasant things,
And all joys
And all straightness
And all relief
And all well-being
And all safety
And all honor

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلِّ رِزْقٍ واسِعٍ حَلالٍ طَيِّبٍ
segments.transliteration: wamin kulli rizqin wasi`in halalin tayyibin,
segments.translation: And all items of sustenance that is expansive, legally gotten, and pleasant
And all graces
And all advantageous things

segments.arabic: نَزَلَتْ أو تَنْزِلُ مِنَ السَّماءِ إلى الأرْضِ في هذِهِ السّاعَةِ
segments.transliteration: nazalat aw tanzilu mina alssama‘i ili alardi fy hdhihi alssa`ati
segments.translation: That have already or will ascend from the heavens to the earth at this very hour,
And at this night
And on this day
And in this month
And in this year.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إنْ كانَتْ ذُنوبي قَدْ أخْلَقَتْ وَجْهِيَ عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: aalllhumma in kanat dhunuby qad akhlaqat wajhiia `indaka,
segments.translation: O Allah: If my sins have deformed my face in Your view
And have thus cut the path taking me to You
And have changed my status with You,

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِنورِ وَجْهِكَ الكَريمِ الَّذي لَمْ يُطْفَأ
segments.transliteration: fainny asaluka binuri wajhika alkarimi alladhy lam yutfa’,
segments.translation: Then, I beseech You in the name of the Light of Your Magnanimous Face that is never extinguished,
And in the name of the face of Your Chosen Prophet, Muhammad,
And in the name of the face of Your well-pleased servant, `Ali,
And in the name of Your intimate servants that You have selected,

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: (I beseech You) that You send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَغْفِرَ لي وَلِوالِدَيَّ وَما وَلَدا
segments.transliteration: Wa’an taghfira ly waliualidayya wama walada,
segments.translation: And forgive for me, for my parents, and for all their offspring
And forgive for the believing men and women
And for all their offspring
All our sins,
Including the insignificant and the major,
And that You seal our lives with righteous deeds,
And that You settle our needs and important desires,
And that You respond to us our well-intended prayers and requests;
So, (please), respond to us,
In the name of Muhammad and his Household.

segments.arabic: اللّهُم صَلّ عَلَى مُحَمّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمّدٍ
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
(please) respond; (please) respond; (please) respond;
Only that which Allah wills shall come to pass.

segments.arabic: لا حَولَ وَلا قُوَّةَ إِلَّا باللهِ
segments.transliteration: la hawla wala quwwata illa ballahi,
segments.translation: There is no power and no might except with Allah.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
segments.translation: Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Honor, above what they describe.
And peace be on the messengers.
And all praise is due to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
O He but Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَظيمٌ
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of those whose names enjoy a great regard with You
And in the name of there is no god save You

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِبَهاءِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bibaha‘i la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the luminosity of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِجَلالِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bijalali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the majesty of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِجَمالِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bijamali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta.
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the splendor of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِنورِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka binuri la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the light of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَمالِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bikamali la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta,
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the excellency of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِعِزَّةِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`izzati la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the honor of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِعِظَمِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`izhami la ilha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the grandeur of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِقَولِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka biqawli la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the saying of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِشَرَفِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bisharafi la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the dignity of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِعَلاءِ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bi`ala‘i la ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of the elevation of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِلا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ يا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
segments.transliteration: asaluka bila ilaha illa anta ya la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You, O He save Whom there is no god

segments.arabic: يا رَبّاهُ يا رَبّاهُ يا رَبّاهُ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya rabbahu ya rabbahu…
segments.translation: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord
I beseech You; O my Master:
O Allah; O my Lord:

segments.arabic: يا سَيِّداهُ يا مَولاهُ يا غِياثاهُ يا مَلْجَآهُ
segments.transliteration: ya sayyidahu ya mawlahu ya ghiyathahu ya malja-ahu
segments.translation: O my Master; O my Lord: O my Aide; O my Shelter;
O the Ultimate goal of my all desires;
O the Most Merciful of all those who show mercy;
I beseech You, for nothing is like You

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ دَعْوَةٍ مُسْتَجابَةٍ دَعاكَ بِها نَبِيٌّ مُرْسَلٌ أوْ مَلَكٌ مُقَرَّبٌ
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka bikulli da`watin mustajabatin da`aka biha nabiyyun mursalun aw malakun muqarrabun
segments.translation: And I beseech You with every responded prayer that has been addressed to You by a missioned Prophet or a favorite angel

segments.arabic: أوْ عَبْدٌ مُؤمِنٌ امْتَحَنْتَ قَلْبَهُ لِلإيمانِ
segments.translation: Or a faithful servant (of You) whose heart has been tried by You to carry faith
And then You responded to his prayer.

segments.arabic: وَأَتَوَجَّهُ إلَيْكَ بِمُحَمَّدٍ نَبِيِّكَ نَبِيِّ الرَّحْمَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa atawajjahu ilayka bimuhammadin nabiyyika nabiyyi alrrahmati
segments.translation: I turn my face towards You asking You in the name of Your Prophet, Muhammad, the Prophet of mercy
And I seek his intercession before You for the sake of Your settlement of my need
O Muhammad: O the Messenger of Allah;

segments.arabic: بِأَبي أَنْتَ وَاُمِّي أَتَوَجَّهُ بِكَ إلى رَبِّكَ وَرَبّي
segments.transliteration: bi-abi anta wa-ummi atawajjahu bika ila rabbika wa rabbi
segments.translation: May Allah accept my father and mother as ransoms for you! In your name do I turn my and your Lord;
And I seek your intercession for the sake of the Lord’s settling my needs.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبّاهُ يَا رَبّاهُ يَا رَبّاهُ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbahu ya rabbahu ya rabbahu
segments.translation: O my Lord; O my Lord; O my Lord;
I beseech You by Your sake,
For there is nothing like You.
And I turn my face towards You, asking You in the name of Muhammad, Your most beloved one,
And in the name of his offspring—the guide ones,
And I seek their intercession for the sake of Your settling my needs.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ اللّٰهُمَّ بِحَياتِكَ الَّتي لا تَموتُ
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka allahumma bihayatika allaty la tamutu
segments.translation: And I beseech You in the name of Your everl-ivingness, since You never dies,
And in the name of the Light of Your Face that is never extinguished
And in the name of Your Eye that never sleeps

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ بِحَقِّ مَنْ حَقُّهُ عَلَيْكَ عَظيمٌ
segments.translation: I beseech You in the name of those whose names enjoy a great regard with You

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.translation: That You may send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
Before everything,
And after everything,
And as many as all things,
And as weighty as all things,
And as full as all things

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ المُصْطَفى
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin `abdika almustafa
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to send blessings upon Muhammad—Your chosen servant
And Your well-pleased Messenger

segments.transliteration: wa aminika almustafa wa najibika duna khalqika
segments.translation: And Your Chosen Trustee and Your selected one among all Your creatures,
And Your most beloved one, and Your elect among all Your beings.
The Warner, the Bearer of good tidings, and the luminous lantern.

segments.arabic: وَعَلى أهْلِ بَيتِهِ الطَّيِّبينَ الطّاهِرينَ المُطَهَّرينَ الأخْيارِ الأبْرار
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ahli baytihi alttayyibina alttahirina al-akhyari al-abrari
segments.translation: And upon his Household—the pure, the immaculate, the purified, the virtuous, and the pious,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى مَلائِكَتِكَ الّذِينَ اسْتَخْلَصْتَهُمْ لِنَفْسِكَ وَحَجَبْتَهُمْ عَنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala mala’ikatika alladhina istakhlastahum linafsika wa hajabtahum `an khalqika
segments.translation: And upon Your angels whom You have chosen for Yourself and screened from Your creatures,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَى أَنْبِيَائِكَ الّذِينَ يُنْبِئُونَ بِالصّدْقِ عَنْكَ
segments.translation: And upon Your Prophets who convey truly from You
And upon Your righteous servants,
Whom You have included with Your mercy;
The leaders, the well-guided, the orthodox, the purified,

segments.transliteration: wa `ala jibra’ila wa mika’ila wa israfila
segments.translation: And upon (Archangels) Gabriel, and Michael, and Israfil,
And the Angel of Death, and Ridwan the doorkeeper of Paradise,
And Malik the doorkeeper of Hell,
And the Holy Spirit

segments.transliteration: wa hamalatil-`arshi wa munkarin wa nakirin
segments.translation: And the Bearers of the (Divine) Throne, and Munkar and Nakir
And the two angels whom are in charge of supervising me

segments.arabic: بِالصّلاةِ الّتِي تُحِبّ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ بِها عَلَيْهِمْ
segments.transliteration: bilssalari allati tuhibbu an tusalliya biha `alayhim
segments.translation: (please bless them all) with the blessing that You like to bless them with;

segments.arabic: صَلاةً كَثيرَةً طَيِّبَةً مُبارَكَةً زاكِيَةً نامِيَةً
segments.transliteration: salatan kathiratan tayyibatan mubarakatan zakiyatan namiyatan
segments.translation: (Let it be) a blessing that is abundant, pure, holy, genuine, growing,
deep, honorable, and virtuous

segments.arabic: تُبَيّنُ بِهَا فَضْلَهُمْ عَلَى الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ
segments.translation: through which You obviously demonstrate their precedence over the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَسْمَعَ صَوْتِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tasma`a sawti
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to hear my voice,
And to respond to my prayer,
And to forgive my sins,
And to give success to my prayer,
And to settle my needs,
And to accept my excuses
And to fulfill Your promise to me,
And to let off my offense,
And to overlook my sins,
And to excuse my wrongdoings,
And to pardon my evildoings,
And to be always present for me
And never reject me
And to have mercy upon me and not to punish me,
And to grant me good health and not to afflict me,

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqany mina alrrzqi atiyabahu wa awsa`ahu
segments.translation: And to grant me from the nicest and most extensive sustenance
And most pleasant and most wholesome
And most plentiful and most abundant

segments.arabic: وَلا تَحْرِمَني يا رَبِّ دِيني وَأمانَتي
segments.transliteration: wa la tahrimni ya rabbi dini wa amanati
segments.translation: And not to deprive me, O my Lord, of my faith and belief trusted with me
And (please) relieve me of my burdens;

segments.arabic: وَلا تُحَمِّلْني ما لا طاقَةَ لي به
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhammilny ma la taqata li bihi
segments.translation: and do not impose on me that which I have not the strength to bear.
O my Master;

segments.arabic: وَأدْخِلْني في كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أدْخَلْتَ فيهِ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa adkhilny fi kull khayrin adkhalta fihi muhammadan wa ala muhammadin
segments.translation: And (please do) include me with every good item that You have chosen from Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأخْرِجْني مِنْ كُلِّ سوءٍ أخْرَجْتَهُمْ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: wa akhrijny min kulli su‘in akhrajtahum minhu
segments.translation: and take me out of any evil from which You have saved them

segments.arabic: وَلا تُفَرِّقْ بَيْني وَبَيْنَهُمْ طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ أبَداً في الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tufarriq bayni wa baynahum tarfata `aynin abadan fiddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: And never separate me from them for even a twinkling of an eye neither in this worldly life nor in the Hereafter.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ كَمَا أَمَرْتَنِي فَاسْتَجِبْ لِي كَمَا وَعَدْتَنِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka kama amartany fastajib li kama wa`adtani
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You have ordered me to do; so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka qalilan min kathirin
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You for a little from the very much,
in the midst of my many needs for which I entirely depend on You,
and You, since eternity, are able to do without them,
but for me it is titanic

segments.arabic: فَامْنُنْ بِهِ عَلَيّ إنّكَ عَلَى كُلّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: famnun bihi `alayya innaka `ala kulli shay‘in qadirun
segments.translation: So, (please do) bestow upon me with them, for You have power over all things.
O Allah: (please do) include us with the righteous ones, out of Your mercy.
And uplift us to the rank of `illiyyin (most elevated rank).

segments.arabic: وَبِكَأْسٍ مِنْ مَعِينٍ مِنْ عَيْنٍ سَلْسَبِيلٍ فَاسْقِنَا
segments.transliteration: wa bikasin min ma`inin min `aynin salsabilin fasqina
segments.translation: And serve us with water running out of spring of Salsabil.

segments.transliteration: wa mina alhuri al`ini birahmatika fazawwijna
segments.translation: And, out of Your mercy, give us as wives the women of Paradise.

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ الْوِلْدَانِ الْمُخَلّدِينَ كَأَنّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَكْنُونٌ فَأَخْدِمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa mina alwildani almukhalldina ka-annahum lu´lu´un maknunun fa-akhdimna
segments.translation: And make the Paradisiacal youths who never alter in age and who are like hidden pearls serve us.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِمَارِ الْجَنّةِ وَلُحُومِ الطّيْرِ فَأَطْعِمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thimari aljannati wa luhumi alttiri fat`imna
segments.translation: And give us food from the fruits of Paradise and from the meat of birds there.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ السّنْدُسِ وَالْحَرِيرِ وَالإسْتَبْرَقِ فَأَلْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiyabi alssundusi wal-hariri wal-istabraqi fa-albisna
segments.translation: And dress us from the clothes of fine and thick silk and rich brodace.
And give us success to catch the Grand Night
The pilgrimage to Your Holy House,

segments.arabic: وَقَتْلاً فِي سَبِيلِكَ مَعَ وَلِيِّكَ فَوَفّقْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa qatlan fi sabilika ma`a waliyyika fawaffiq lana
segments.translation: And the martyrdom in Your way under the pennon of Your Representative.

segments.transliteration: wa saliha aldd`a‘i wal-masalati fastajib lana
segments.translation: And respond to our goodly prayer and invocation.
O our Creator: (please) listen to (our prayer) and respond to us.

segments.arabic: وَإذَا جَمَعْتَ الأَوّلِينَ وَالآخِرِينَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ فَارْحَمْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa idha jama`ta al-awwalina wal-akhirina yawma alqiyamati farhamna
segments.translation: And when You shall gather the past and the coming generations on the Resurrection Day, (please) have mercy upon us.

segments.arabic: وَبَرَاءَةً مِنَ النَّارِ وَأماناً مِنَ العَذابِ فَاكْتُبْ لَنَا
segments.transliteration: wa bara‘atan mina alnnari wa amanan minal-`dhabi faktub lana
segments.translation: And (please) release us from Hellfire and secure us against the chastisement.
And do not fetter us in Hell.
And do not add us to the devils.

segments.arabic: وَفِي النَّارِ عَلَى وُجُوهِنَا فَلا تَكْبُبْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnari `ala wujuhina fala takbubna
segments.translation: And do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire.

segments.transliteration: wa fi hawanika wa `adhabika fala taqlubna
segments.translation: And do not make us turn over in Your humiliation and in Your chastisement.

segments.transliteration: wa mina alzzuqqumi wal-ddari`i fala tut`imna
segments.translation: And do not feed us from zaqqum and thorns.

segments.arabic: وَفِي النَّارِ عَلَى وُجُوهِنَا فَلا تَكْبُبْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa fi alnnari `ala wujuhina fala takbubna
segments.translation: And do not throw us down on our faces in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ ثِيَابِ النَّارِ وَسَرَابِيلِ الْقَطِرَانِ فَلا تُلْبِسْنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min thiabi alnnari wa sarabili alqatirani fala tulbisna
segments.translation: And do not dress us from the clothes of fire and the shirts of pitchl

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ كُلّ سُوءٍ يَا لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ بِحَقّ لا إلهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ فَنَجّنَا
segments.transliteration: wa min kulli su‘in ya la ilaha illa anta bihaqqi la ilaha illa anta fanajjina
segments.translation: And save us from all evils; O there is no god save You, I beseech You in the name of there is no god save You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إني أَسْأَلُكَ وَلَمْ يُسْألْ مِثْلُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka wa lam yus’al mithluka
segments.translation: O Allah: I am beseeching You, and there is none like You to be besought.

segments.arabic: وَأرْغَبُ إلَيْكَ وَلَمْ يُرْغَبْ إلى مِثْلِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa arghabu ilayka wa lam yurghab ila mithlika
segments.translation: and to You do I desire, and there is none like You to be desired.

segments.arabic: يَا رَبِّ أَنْتَ مَوْضِعُ مَسْألَةِ السّائِلينَ
segments.transliteration: ya rabbi anta mawdi`u mas’alati alssa’ilina
segments.translation: O my Lord: It is You Who is the object of the requests of the beseechers,
and it is You Who is the ultimate goal of the desire of those who have desires.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ بِأفْضَلِ أسْمائِكَ كُلِّها وَأنْجَحِها
segments.transliteration: as’aluka allahumma bi-afdali asma’ika kulliha wa anjahiha
segments.translation: I beseech You, O Allah, in the name of the best and the most effective of all Your (Excellent) Names
O Allah; O the All-beneficent,

segments.arabic: وَبِاسْمِكَ المَخْزونِ المَصُونِ الأعَزِّ الأَجَلِّ الأعْظَمِ الَّذي تُحِبُّهُ وَتَهْواهُ
segments.transliteration: wa bismika almakhzuni almasuni al-a`azzi al-ajalli al-a`zami alladhi tuhibbuhu wa tahwahu
segments.translation: and I beseech You by Your Name—the sealed, the reserved, the mightiest, the loftiest, the greatest,; that You love and like,
and that You are pleased with him who prays You by it,
and thus You answer his prayers.

segments.arabic: وَحَقَّ عَلَيْكَ يا رَبِّ أنْ لا تَحْرِمَ سائِلَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa haqqa `alayka ya rabbi an la tahrima sa’ilaka
segments.translation: It is incumbent upon You, O Lord, that You never disappoint him who beseeches You.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka bikulli ismin huwa laka
segments.translation: O Allah: I do beseech You by every name that belongs to You,
and by which a servant of You has prayed You
in a land or in a sea
or in a plain or on a mountain
or at Your Sacred House,
or in any of Your ways.

segments.arabic: فَأَدْعُوكَ يا رَبِّ دُعاءَ مَنْ قَدِ اشْتَدَّتْ فَاقَتُهُ
segments.transliteration: fa ad`uka ya rabbi du`a’a man qad ishtaddat faqatuh
segments.translation: So, I beseech You, O my Lord, the beseeching of him whose neediness is great
and whose offense is grave, and whose efforts are modest,
and who is about to perish
and who has no trust in any of his deeds

segments.arabic: وَلَمْ يَجِدْ لِما هُوَ فيهِ سادّاً وَلا لِذَنْبِهِ غافِراً وَلا لِعَثْرَتِهِ مُقيلاً غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa lam yajid lima huwa fihi saddan wa la lidhanbihi ghafiran wa la li`athratihi muqilan ghayruka
segments.translation: and who has not found anyone who can make up for him or can forgive his sin or can overlook his slips save You,
He is thus resorting to You,
seeking Your refuge,
worshipping You,
showing no disdain, no pride,

segments.transliteration: wa la mustahsirin wa la mutajabbirin
segments.translation: no arrogance, no condescension,
and no aloofness;
rather, he is miserable, needy,
fearful, and seeking shelter.
I beseech You, O Allah, O the All-beneficent,
O the All-tender, O the All-bestower of boons,
O the magnificent Maker of the heavens and the earth,
O the Lord of majesty and honor;

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
blessings that are abundant, superb,
sanctified, ever-increasing,
pure, and honorable.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ اَللّٰهُمَّ أنْ تَغْفِرَ لي في شَهْري هذا وَتَرْحَمَني
segments.transliteration: as’aluka allahumma an taghfira li fi shahri hadha wa tarhamani
segments.translation: I beseech You, O Allah, to forgive me in this month and to have mercy upon me
and to release me from Hellfire

segments.arabic: وَتُعْطِيَني فِيهِ خَيْرَ ما أَعْطَيْتَ بِهِ أحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa tu`tiyani fihi khayra ma a`tayta bihi ahadan min khalqika
segments.translation: and to grant me the best of that which You have ever given any of Your creatures
and the best of that which You will ever give,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَجْعَلْهُ آخِرَ شَهْرِ رَمَضانَ صُمْتُهُ لَكَ مُنْذُ أسْكَنْتَنِي أرْضَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa la taj`alhu akhira shahri ramadana sumtuhu laka mundhu askantani ardaka
segments.translation: and (please) do not decide this month of Ramadan to be the last one in which I observe fasting for Your sake since You allowed me to live on Your lands
up to this day;

segments.arabic: بَلِ اجْعَلْهُ عَلَيَّ أتَمَّهُ نِعْمَةً وَأَعَمَّهُ عافِيَةً
segments.translation: rather (please) make it the month of the most perfect bounty that You have ever conferred upon me and of the most excellent well-being that You have ever covered me with,
and of the most expansive sustenance that You have ever decided for me,
and of the most profuse reward that You grant me and of the most pleasant times that have ever come upon me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أعُوذُ بِكَ وَبِوَجْهِكَ الكَريمِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika wa biwaj-hika alkarimi
segments.translation: O Allah: I do seek Your protection and the protection of Your Magnanimous Face,
and Your Majestic Kingdom,

segments.arabic: أنْ تَغْرُبَ الشَّمْسُ مِنْ يَومي هَذا
segments.transliteration: an taghruba alshshamsu min yawmi hadha
segments.translation: against that sun sets at the end of this day,
or this day comes to its end,

segments.arabic: أوْ يَطْلُعَ الفَجْرُ مِنْ لَيلَتي هذِهِ
segments.transliteration: aw yatlu`a alfajru min laylati hadhihi
segments.translation: or this night dawns,
or this month elapses,

segments.transliteration: wa laka qibali tabi`atun aw dhanbun
segments.translation: but there is still an offense of a sin due to which You shall punish me,

segments.arabic: أوْ خَطيئَةٌ تُريدُ أنْ تُقايِسَني بِها
segments.transliteration: aw khati’atun turidu an tuqayisani biha
segments.translation: or a wrongdoing for which You may want to interrogate me,
or punish me,

segments.arabic: أوْ تُوقِفَنِي بِها مَوْقِفَ خِزْيٍ في الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: aw tuqifani biha mawqifa khizyin fiddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: or put me in a disgraceful situation in this world or the next world,
or chastise me on the day when I will meet You.
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ لِهَمّ لا يُفَرّجُهُ غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka lihammin la yufarrijuhu ghayruka
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You about a grief that none can relieve save You,

segments.transliteration: wa lirahmatin la tunalu illa bika
segments.translation: And for mercy that cannot be attained except through You,

segments.transliteration: wa likarbin la yakshifuhu illa anta
segments.translation: And about hardship from which none can rescue except You

segments.transliteration: wa liraghbatin la tublaghu illa bika
segments.translation: And for desire that cannot be obtained except by You
And for a need that cannot be settled without Your intervention

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ مَا أرَدْتَنِي بِهِ مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama kana min sha’nika ma aradtani bihi min mas’alatika
segments.translation: O Allah: As You have decided to allow me to pray You,
And as You have had mercy upon me through allowing me to refer to You,

segments.arabic: فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ الإجَابَةُ لِي فِيمَا دَعَوْتُكَ
