segments.transliteration: falyakun min shanika alijabatu li fima da`awtuka
segments.translation: So, please decide that my prayers are responded by You,
And grant me redemption from that against which I have resorted to You.

segments.arabic: أيَا مُلَيّنَ الحَدِيدِ لِدَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السّلامُ
segments.translation: O He Who made the iron pliant for (Prophet) David, peace be upon him;

segments.arabic: يَا كَاشِفَ الضّرّ وَالكُرَبِ العِظَامِ عَنْ أَيّوبَ
segments.transliteration: ya kashifa alddurri wal-kurabi al`izami `an ayyuba
segments.translation: O He Who took off the harm and calamity that afflict (Prophet) Job;
O He Who relieved the sorrow of (Prophet) Jacob;
O He Who removed the grief of (Prophet) Joseph:
(Please do) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
And (please) do to me that which befits You,

segments.transliteration: fa innaka ahlu alttaqwa wa ahlu almaghfirati
segments.translation: You are surely worthy of being feared and worthy of forgiving.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ أَنْتَ ثِقَتِي فِي كُلِّ كَرْبٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma anta thiqati fi kulli karbin
segments.translation: O Allah: I trust in You in hard times
and confide in you hopefully in tribulations,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْتَ لِي فِي كُلِّ أَمْرٍ نَزَلَ بِي ثِقَةٌ وَعِدَّةٌ
segments.transliteration: wa anta li fi kulli amrin nazala bi thiqatun wa `iddatun
segments.translation: and in You lie my faith and hope in every misfortune that inflicts me.

segments.arabic: كَمْ مِنْ كَرْبٍ يَضْعُفُ فِيهِ الفُؤَادُ
segments.transliteration: kam min karbin yad`ufu fihi alfu’adu
segments.translation: Many were the griefs that crinkled my heart,
were hardly curable,
caused my friends to disappoint me,
and made my enemies rejoice (over my helplessness);
but when I relegated them –i.e. the griefs- to You and complained about them to You,

segments.arabic: رَغْبَةً مِنِّي فِيهِ إِلَيْكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
segments.translation: because I heartily intended You, no one else,

segments.transliteration: fa farrajtahu wa kashaftahu wa kafaytahu
segments.translation: You relieved and alleviated them and saved me from their consequences.
You are certainly the source of all graces,
the cause of all favors,
and the only intention of aspirations.
I seek the protection of all of the Perfect Words of Allah

segments.arabic: مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ مِنْ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: min sharri ma khalaqa min shay’in
segments.translation: against the evil of whatever thing He has created.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ عافِني في يَومي هذا حَتّى أُمْسِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma `afini fi yawmi hadha hatta umsi
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) convey upon me with good health on this day up to the evening.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بَرَكَةَ يَوْمي هَذا
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka barakata yawmi hadha
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You to grant me the blessing of this day

segments.arabic: وَما نَزَلَ فِيهِ مِنْ عَافِيَةٍ وَمَغْفِرَةٍ وَرَحْمَةٍ وَرِضْوانٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ma nazala fihi min `afiyatin wa maghfiratin wa rahmatin wa ridwanin
segments.translation: as well as whatever has been descended on this day, including well-being, forgiveness, mercy, pleasure,

segments.arabic: وَرِزْقٍ وَاسِعٍ حَلالٍ تَبْسُطُهُ عَلَيَّ وَعَلى وَالِدَيَّ وَوِلْدِي وَأهْلي وَعِيالِي وَأهْلِ حُزانَتِي
segments.transliteration: wa rizqin wasi`in halalin tabsutuhu `alayya wa `ala walidayya wa wildi wa ahli wa `iyali wa ahli huzanati
segments.translation: and sustenance that is expansive and legally gotten that You may extend it for me, for my parents, for my sons, for my wife, for my dependants, for my friends,
for all those whom I love, for all thos who love me,
for my descendants and for my ascendants.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَالشِّرْكِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min alshshakki walshshirki
segments.translation: O Allah: I seek Your protection against doubt and monotheism
and envy and oppression
and fanaticism and rage.
O Allah; the Lord of the Seven Skies
and the Lord of the seven layers of the earth

segments.arabic: وَما فِيهِنَّ وَما بَيْنَهُنَّ وَرَبَّ العَرْشِ العَظيمِ
segments.transliteration: wa ma fihinna wa ma baynahunna wa rabba al-`arshi al-`azimi
segments.translation: and whatever thing exists in and between them; and the Lord of the Great Throne:
(Please do) bless Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَاكْفِني المُهِمَّ مِنْ أمْري بِما شِئْتَ
segments.transliteration: wakfini almuhimma min amri bima shi’ta
segments.translation: and relieve me from my aggrieving matters by the means that You will
and the method that You will.

segments.arabic: ااَللّٰهُمَّ إنَّكَ قُلْتَ لِنَبِيِّكَ صَلّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ: (وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَى)
segments.transliteration: allaumma innaka qulta linabiyyika salla allahu `layhi wa alihi: wa lasawfa yu`tika rabbuka fatarda
segments.translation: O Allah: You have said to Your Prophet—Peace of Allah be upon him and his Household: “And soon shall your Lord give you so that you shall be well pleased.”

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إنَّ نَبِيَّكَ وَرَسُولَكَ وَحَبِيبَكَ وَخِيَرَتَكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inna nabiyyaka wa rasulaka wa habibaka wa khiyarataka min khalqika
segments.translation: O Allah: Verily, Your Prophet, Messenger, Most Beloved, and Elite from among Your creatures

segments.arabic: لا يَرْضى بأنْ تُعَذِّبَ أحَداً مِنْ أُمَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: la yarda bi-an tu`adhdhiba ahadan min ummatihi
segments.translation: is not pleased if You torment one of his nation

segments.arabic: دَانَكَ بِمُوالاتِهِ وَمُوالاةِ الأَئِمَّةِ مِنْ أهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: danaka bimuwalatihi wa muwalati al-a’immati min ahli baytihi
segments.translation: who worships You through acting loyally to the Prophet and to the Imams from his Household
even if that one is guilty and sinful,
(and to torture him) in Hellfire.

segments.arabic: فَأَجِرْني يَا رَبِّ مِنْ جَهَنَّمَ وَعَذابِها
segments.transliteration: fa ajirni ya rabbi min jahannama wa `adhabiha
segments.translation: So, (please) rescue me from Hell and its torture,

segments.transliteration: wa habni limuhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: and pardon me for the sake of Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad;
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: يَا جَامِعاً بَيْنَ أهْلِ الجَنَّةِ عَلى تَأَلُّفٍ مِنَ القُلوبِ وَشِدَّةِ الْمَحَبَّةِ
segments.transliteration: ya jami`an bayna ahli aljannati `ala ta’allufin mina alqulubi wa shiddati almahabbati
segments.translation: O He Who shall gather the inhabitants of Paradise on terms of cordiality and affability;
and He Who shall remove rancor that may be in their breasts,
and He shall thus make them brothers; face to face on couches.
O He Who Shall gather between those who are obedient to Him
and him for whom it was created.

segments.transliteration: wa ya mufarrija huzni kulli mahzunin
segments.translation: O He Who relieves the sad of every aggried one;
O He Who is the resource of every stranger;

segments.arabic: يا رَاحِمِي فِي رَغْبَتِي وَفِي كُلِّ أحْوالِي بِحُسْنِ الحِفْظِ وَالكَلاءَةِ لِي
segments.transliteration: ya rahimi fi raghbati wa fi kulli ahwali
segments.translation: O He Who covers me with His mercy when I desire for something as well as in all my circumstances by means of well safeguarding and protection.

segments.arabic: يَا مُفَرِّجَ ما بِي مِنَ الضِّيقِ وَالخَوْفِ
segments.transliteration: ya mufarrija ma bi mina alddiqi walkhawfi
segments.translation: O He Who relieves all my depression and fears;
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَاجْمَعْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ أَحِبَّتِي وَقادَتِي وَسادَتِي وَهُداتِي وَمَوالِيَّ
segments.transliteration: wajma` bayni wa bayna ahibbati wa qadati wa sadati wa hudati wa mawaliyya
segments.translation: and join me with my beloved ones: my leaders, my masters, my guides, and my lords.
O He Who joins the dear ones with each other;
(please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْجَعْنِي بِانْقِطاعِ رُؤيَةِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: wa la tafja`ni binqita`i ru’yati muhammadin wa ali muhammadin `anni
segments.translation: and never distress me by preventing me from seeing Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
or ceasing them from seeing me.

segments.arabic: فَبِكُلِّ مَسائِلِكَ يَا رَبِّ أدْعُوكَ إلَهي
segments.transliteration: fabikulli masa’ilika ya rabbi ad`uka ilahi
segments.translation: I thus beseech You, O my God, in the name of all that by which You are prayed;
So, please respond to my beseeching You,
O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِانْقِطاعِ حُجَّتِي وَوُجُوبِ حُجَّتِكَ أنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka binqita`i hujjati wa wujubi hujjatika an taghfira li
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You in the name of that I have no claim against You but You have all claims against me, that You may forgive me.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ إِنِّي أعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ خِزْيِ يَوْمِ الْمَحْشَرِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a`udhu bika min khizyi yawmi almahshari
segments.translation: O Allah: I seek Your protection against the disgrace of the Day of Resurrecting,

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ شَرَّ ما بَقِيَ مِنَ الدَّهْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sharri ma baqiya mina alddahri
segments.translation: and against the evil of the coming days of my life,
and against the evil of the enemies,
and against the approaching of termination
and against cureless maladies,
and against disappointment,
and against fading away of boons,
and against unexpected chastisements.

segments.arabic: اَللّٰهُمَّ اجْعَلْ لِي قَلْباً يَخْشاكَ كَأَنَّهُ يَراكَ إلَى يَوْمِ يَلْقاكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al li qalban yakhshaka ka’annahu yaraka ila yawmi yalqaka
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) decide for me a heart that fears You as if it can see You directly up to the day on which it shall meet You.

duas.title: Allahumma Inni Asaluka Min Fadhlik
duas.description: Both Shaykh al-Tusi and Sayyid ibn Tawus have recommended saying the following supplication throughout the days of the month of Ramadan:

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ فَضْلِكَ بِأَفْضَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min fadlika bi-afdalihi
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from the best of Your favors,
and all Your favors are excellent.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your whole favor.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ رِزْقِكَ بِأَعَمِّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min rizqika bi-a`ammihi
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from the most widespread of Your sustenance,
and all Your sustenance is widespread.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your whole sustenance.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ عَطَائِكَ بِأَهْنَئِهِ
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from the most wholesome of Your bestowal,
and Your entire bestowal is wholesome.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your entire bestowal.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ خَيْرِكَ بِأَعْجَلِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min khayrika bi-a`jalihi
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from Your most instant welfare,
and Your entire welfare is instant.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your entire welfare.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ مِنْ إِحْسَانِكَ بِأَحْسَنِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka min ihsanika bi-ahsanihi
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You to grant me from You most excellent benevolence,
and Your entire benevolence is excellent.
O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your entire benevolence.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِمَا تُجِيبُنِي بِهِ حِينَ أَسْأَلُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bima tujibuni bihi hina as'aluka
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of all that through which You respond to me if I beseech You;
therefore, (please do) respond to me, O Allah.
And (please do) send blessings to Muhammad, Your pleased servant,
chosen Messenger,

segments.transliteration: wa aminika wa najiyyika duna khalqika
segments.translation: trustee, Your confidant one among all Your beings,
selected one among all Your servants,
true Prophet, and Your much-loved one.

segments.arabic: وَصَلِّ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِكَ وَخِيَرَتِكَ مِنَ ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa salli `ala rasulika wa khiyaratika min al`alamina
segments.translation: And (please do) send blessings to (him); Your messenger, Your choicest among all people,
the conveyor of good tidings (for the believers), the warner,
and the luminous lantern;
and (please do send blessings) to his Household, the pious and the immaculate;
and to Your angels whom You have attached to Yourself
and concealed against Your beings;

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ أَنْبِيَائِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ يُنْبِئُونَ عَنْكَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ
segments.translation: and to Your Prophets who convey Your instructions truly;
and to Your Messengers whom You have given exclusively Your Revelations
and made excel the others by means of Your messages;
and to Your righteous servants
whom You have included with Your mercy,

segments.transliteration: al-a'immati almuhtadina alrrashidina wa awliya'ika almutahharina
segments.translation: the guides, the well-guided, the orthodox, and Your pure saints;

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ جَبْرَائِيلَ وَمِيكَائِيلَ وَإِسْرَافِيلَ وَمَلَكِ ٱلْمَوْتِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala jabra'ila wa mika'ila wa israfila wa malaki almawti
segments.translation: and to (Archangels) Gabriel, Michael, Seraph, and the Angel of Death;
and to Ridwan the Keeper of Paradise;
and to Malik the Keeper of Hell,
and the Holy Spirit,
the Spirit of Faith,
and the Favorite Bearers of Your Throne;
and to the two angels who watch over me—

segments.arabic: بِٱلصَّلاَةِ ٱلَّتِي تُحِبُّ أَنْ يُصَلِّيَ بِهَا عَلَيْهِمْ أَهْلُ ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَأَهْلُ ٱلأَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: bilssalati allati tuhibbu an yusalliya biha `alayhim ahlu alssamawati wa ahlu al-aradina
segments.translation: [bless them all with] blessings that You desire that the inhabitants of the heavens and the inhabitants of the earth pray You to send to them;
blessings that are pure, abundant,
holy, genuine, growing, evident,
deep, honorable, and virtuous

segments.arabic: تُبَيِّنُ بِهَا فَضْلَهُمْ عَلَىٰ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.translation: through which You obviously demonstrate their precedence over the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً ٱلْوَسِيلَةَ وَٱلشَّرَفَ وَٱلْفَضِيلَةَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`ti muhammadan alwasilata walshsharafa walfadilata
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) give Muhammad subtle way, honor, and precedence,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْزِهِ خَيْرَ مَا جَزَيْتَ نَبِيّاً عَنْ أُمَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wajzihi khayra ma jazayta nabiyyan `an ummatihi
segments.translation: and reward him with the best reward that You ever give to a Prophet on behalf of his nation.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَأَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ مَعَ كُلِّ زُلْفَةٍ زُلْفَةً
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa a`ti muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi ma`a kulli zulfatin zulfatan
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) give Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Household—an additional proximity with each proximity that You decide for him;
and an additional subtle means with each means that You decide for him;
and an additional merit with each merit that You decide for him;
and an additional honor with each honor that You decide for him.

segments.arabic: تُعْطِي مُحَمَّداً وَآلَهُ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ أَفْضَلَ مَا أَعْطَيْتَ أَحَداً مِنَ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: tu`ti muhammadan wa alahu yawma alqiyamati afdala ma a`tayta ahadan min al-awwalina wal-akhirina
segments.translation: And (please do) give Muhammad and his Household, on the Resurrection Day, the best of all that which You have given to any of Your creatures from the past and the coming generations.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَٱجْعَلْ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ أَدْنَىٰ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ مِنْكَ مَجْلِساً
segments.transliteration: allahumma waj`al muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi adna almursalina minka majlisan
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) choose for Muhammad—peace of Allah be upon him and his Household—the nearest position to You,
the most expansive abode in Paradise in Your vicinity,
and the most effective means to You.
And (please do) make him the chief interceder,
the chief mediator,
the first speaker,
and the most successful petitioner.

segments.arabic: وَٱبْعَثْهُ ٱلْمَقَامَ ٱلْمَحْمُودَ ٱلَّذِي يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ ٱلأَوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wab`athhu almaqama almahmuda alladhi yaghbituhu bihi al-awwaluna wal-akhiruna
segments.translation: And (please do) send him the Praiseworthy Standing due to which all the past and coming generations will envy him.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
to hear my voice,
to respond to my plea,
to overlook my sins,
to excuse my wrongdoings,
to give success to my request,
to grant my needs,
to fulfill Your promise to me,
to let off my offense,
to forgive my sins,
to pardon my evildoings,
to accept me and not to reject me,
to have mercy upon me and not to punish me,
to grant me good health and not to afflict me,

segments.arabic: وَتَرْزُقَنِي مِنَ ٱلرِّزْقِ أَطْيَبَهُ وَأَوْسَعَهُ وَلاَ تَحْرِمَنِي
segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqani min alrrizqi atyabahu wa awsa`ahu wa la tahrimani
segments.translation: and to grant me from the nicest and most extensive sustenance and not to deprive me (of Your sustenance).
O my Lord, (please do) help me settle my debts,
relieve me of my burdens,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ تُحَمِّلْنِي مَا لاَ طَاقَةَ لِي بِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la tuhammilni ma la taqata li bihi
segments.translation: and do not impose on me that which I have not the strength to bear.

segments.arabic: يَا مَوْلاَيَ وَأَدْخِلْنِي فِي كُلِّ خَيْرٍ أَدْخَلْتَ فِيهِ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: ya mawlaya wa adkhilni fi kulli khayrin adkhalta fihi muhammadan wa ala muhammadin
segments.translation: O my Master, (please do) include me with every good item with which You have included Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَأَخْرِجْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ سُوءٍ أَخْرَجْتَ مِنْهُ مُحَمَّداً وَآلَ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: wa akhrijni min kulli su'in akhrajta minhu muhammadan wa ala muhammadin
segments.translation: and take me out of any evil from which You have taken out Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
Your blessings be upon him and them.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمْ وَرَحْمَةُ ٱللَّهِ وَبَرَكَاتُهُ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayhi wa `alayhim wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace, Allah’s mercy, and blessings be upon him and them.
O Allah, I am praying You as You have ordered me to do;
so, please respond to me as You have promised.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ قَلِيلاً مِنْ كَثِيرٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka qalilan min kathirin
segments.translation: O Allah, I ask You for a little from the very much
in the midst of my many needs for which I entirely depend on You,
and You, since eternity, are able to do without them,
but for me, it is titanic,
and for You, it is very easy and simple.

segments.arabic: فَٱمْنُنْ عَلَيَّ بِهِ إِنَّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: famnun `alayya bihi innaka `ala kulli shay'in qadirun
segments.translation: So, (please do) bestow upon me with them, for You have power over all things.
Respond to me, O Lord of the worlds!.

duas.reference: Tusi’s Misbah, 623-625. Tahdhib, iii, 121-122. Iqbal, 98-100, thence in Bihar, xcv, 111, b 6. Kafcami’s Misbah, 623. Balad, 226-227..

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ يَا رَبِّ أَصْبَحْتُ لَا أَرْجُو غَيْرَكَ وَ لَا أَدْعُو سِ وَاكَ وَ لَا أَرْغَبُ إِلَّا إِلَيْكَ وَ لَا أَتَضَرَّعُ إِلَّا عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: Allahumma ya rabbi asbahtu la arju ghayraka wa la ad’u siwaka wa la arghabu illa ilayka wa la atadarru’u illa indaka
segments.translation: “O‟ my God! O‟ Lord! I made it to the morning having hopes in none but You. I called none but You. I desire none but You. I cry to no one but You.

segments.arabic: وَ لَا أَلُوذُ إِلَّا بِفِنَائِكَ إِذْ لَوْ دَعَوْتُ غَيْرَكَ لَمْ يُجِبْنِي
segments.transliteration: wa la aludhu illa bifenayika idh law da’awtu ghayraka lam yujibni
segments.translation: I take refuge in no one but You for if I plead to others,they would not answer me,

segments.arabic: وَ لَوْ رَجَوْتُ غَيْرَكَ لَأَخْلَفَ رَجَائِي
segments.transliteration: wa law rajawtu ghayraka la’akhlafa raja’i
segments.translation: and if I place hope in others, they would disappoint my hopes.

segments.arabic: وَ أَنْتَ ثِقَتِي وَ رَجَائِي وَ مَوْلَايَ وَ خَالِقِي وَ بَارِئِي وَ مُصَوِّرِي
segments.transliteration: wa anta thiqati wa raja’i wa mawlaya wa khaliki wa bari’i wa musawwiri
segments.translation: You are my trust, my hope, my guardian, my Creator and my designer.

segments.arabic: نَاصِيَتِي بِيَدِكَ تَحْكُمُ فِيَّ كَيْفَ تَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: nasiyati biyadika tahkumu fiyya kayfa tasha’u
segments.translation: You have control over me and rule over me as You wish.

segments.arabic: لَا أَمْلِكُ لِنَفْسِي مَا أَرْجُو وَ لَا أَسْتَطِيعُ دَفْعَ مَا أَحْذَرُ
segments.transliteration: la amluku linafsi ma arju wa la astati’u dafa’a ma ahtharu
segments.translation: I cannot attain what I hope for myself.I cannot fend off what I fear of.

segments.arabic: أَصْبَحْتُ مُرْتَهِناً بِعَمَلِي وَ أَصْبَحَ الْأَمْرُ بِيَدِ غَيْرِي
segments.transliteration: asbahtu murtahinan bi’amali wa asbaha al-amru biyadi ghayri
segments.translation: I made it to the morning while I am enslaved by my deeds, with the affairs of the morning in the hands of others than me.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ أُشْهِدُكَ وَ كَفَى بِكَ شَهِيداً وَ أُشْهِدُ مَلَائِكَتَكَ وَ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَ أَنْبِيَاءَكَ وَ رُسُلَكَ عَلَى
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni asbahtu ushhiduka wa kafa bika shahidan wa ushhidu mala’ikataka wa hamalata arshika wa anbiyaka wa rusulaka ala
segments.translation: O‟ my God! I made it to the morning taking You as a witness to You, and it suffuces for me to take You as a witness. I take Your angels, the bearers of Your Throne, Your Prophets (as) and Messengers (as) as a witness.

segments.arabic: أَنِّي أَتَوَلَّى مَنْ تَوَلَّيْتَهُ وَ أَتَبَرَّأُ مِمَّنْ تَبَرَّأْتَ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: anni atawalla man tawallaytahu wa atabarra’u mimman tabarra’ta minhu
segments.translation: I follow what they followed and I disavow from what they disavowed.

segments.arabic: وَ أُومِنُ بِمَا أَنْزَلْتَ عَلَى أَنْبِيَائِكَ وَ رُسُلِكَ فَافْتَحْ مَسَامِعَ قَلْبِي لِذِكْرِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa uminu bima anzalta ala anbiyaka wa rusulika faftah masamia qalbi lidhikrika
segments.translation: And I believe in what You have sent to Your Prophets (as) and Messengers (as). Please open my inner ears for Your Remembrance

segments.arabic: حَتَّى أَتَّبِعَ كِتَابَكَ وَ أُصَدِّقَ رُسُلَكَ وَ أُومِنَ بِوَعْدِكَ وَ أُوفِيَ بِعَهْدِكَ فَإِنَّ أَمْرَ الْقَلْبِ بِيَدِكَ
segments.transliteration: hatta attabi’a kitabaka wa usaddiqu rusulaka wa umina biwa’dika wa ufiya bi’ahdika fa’inn amra al-qalbi biyadika
segments.translation: so that I follow Your Book, acknowledge Your Prophet (as), believe in Your Promise, honor Your Covenants as the control of the heart lies in Your Hands!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْقُنُوطِ مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ وَ الْيَأْسِ مِنْ رَأْفَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni a’udhu bika mina al-qunuti min rahmatika wa al-ya’si min ra’fatika
segments.translation: O‟ my God! I take refuge in You from disappointment of Your Mercy and disappointment in Your Kindness.

segments.arabic: فَأَعِذْنِي مِنَ الشَّكِّ وَ الشِّرْكِ وَ الرَّيْبِ وَ النِّفَاقِ وَ الرِّيَاءِ وَ السُّمْعَةِ
segments.transliteration: fa’a’idhni mina al-shakki wa al-shirki wa al-raybi wa al-nifaqi wa al-riya’i wa al-sum’ati
segments.translation: Please give me refuge from doubt, polytheism, doubt and hypocrisy, showing off and seeking fame.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْنِي فِي جِ وَارِكَ الَّذِي لَا يُرَامُ
segments.transliteration: wa aj’alni fi ji warika alladhi la yuramu
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Please establish me in a place near Yourself that does not collapse!

segments.arabic: وَ احْفَظْنِي مِنَ الشَّكِّ الَّذِي صَاحِبُهُ يُسْتَهَانُ
segments.transliteration: wa ahfazhni mina al-shakki alladhi sahibuhu yustahanu
segments.translation: And protect me from doubt that causes humiliation.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَ كُلَّمَا قَصُرَ عَنْهُ اسْتِغْفَارِي مِنْ سُوءٍ لَا يَعْلَمُهُ غَيْرُكَ فَعَافِنِي مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma wa kullama qasura anhu istighfari min su’in la ya’lamuhu ghayruka fa’afini minhu
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Please forgive me for my evil deeds I have failed to ask You for forgiveness for and no one but You knows about them and forgive me for them.

segments.arabic: وَ اغْفِرْهُ لِي فَإِنَّكَ كَاشِفُ الْغَمِّ مُفَرِّجُ الْهَمَّ رَحْمَانُ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِوَ رَحِيمُهُمَا
segments.transliteration: wa aghfirhu li fa’innaka kashifu al-ghammi mufarriju al-hammi rahmanu al-dunya wa al-akhiratiwa rahimuhuma
segments.translation: Verily You are the Remover of sorrow, the One who dispels grief and the Merciful in this world, the Hereafter and the Compassionate.

segments.arabic: فَامْنُنْ عَلَيَّ بِالرَّحْمَةِ الَّتِي رَحِمْتَ بِهَا مَلَائِكَتَكَ وَ رُسُلَكَ وَ أَوْلِيَاءَكَ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَ الْمُؤْمِنَاتِ
segments.transliteration: fa’amnun alayya birrahmati allati rahimta biha mala’ikataka wa rusulaka wa awliyaka mina al-mu’minina wa al-mu’minat
segments.translation: Please favor me with mercy by which you had mercy on Your angels, Messengers (as), and friends from the believing men and women.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّ هَذَا الْيَوْمِ وَ مَا أَنْزَلْتَ فِيهِ مِنْ بَلَاءٍ أَوْ مُصِيبَةٍ أَوْ غَمٍّ أَوْ هَمٍّ
segments.transliteration: allahumma rabba hadha al-yawmi wa ma anzalta fihi min bala’in aw musibatin aw ghammin aw hamm
segments.translation: O‟ my God! O‟ Lord of this day and all that is sent on it including disasters, calamities, sorrow or grief.

segments.arabic: فَاصْرِفْهُ عَنِّي وَ عَنْ أَهْلِ بَيْتِي وَ وُلْدِي وَ إِخْوَانِي وَ مَعَارِفِي وَ مَنْ كَانَ مِنِّي بِسَبِيلٍ
segments.transliteration: fasrifhu anni wa an ahli bayti wa waladi wa ikhwani wa ma’arifi wa man kana minni bisabilin
segments.translation: Please remove them all from me, my family, my parents, my brethren and my acquaintances,being on the same path.
and all believing men and women who are associated with me

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَصْبَحْتُ عَلَى كَلِمَةِ الْإِخْلَاصِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni asbahtu ala kalimati al-ikhlas
segments.translation: O‟ my God! I made it to the morning on pure words,

segments.arabic: وَ فِطْرَةِ الْإِسْلَامِ وَ مِلَّةِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَوَاتُكَ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa fitrati al-islami wa millati ibrahima wa dini muhammadin salawatuka alayhi wa alihi
segments.translation: Islam‟s nature, Abraham‟s nation, and Muhammad‟s (as) religion.

segments.arabic: وَ تَوَفَّنِي عَلَيْهِ اللَّهُمَّ احْفَظْنِي وَ أَحْيِنِي عَلَى ذَلِكَ‌
segments.transliteration: wa tawaffani alayhi allahumma ahfazhni wa ahyini ala dhalika
segments.translation: O‟ my God! Please safeguard me and keep me alive on this Path, and take away my life on this Path,

segments.arabic: وَ ابْعَثْنِي يَوْمَ تَبْعَثُ الْخَلَائِقَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ab’athni yawma tab’athu al-khala’iq fihi
segments.translation: and resurrect me on that Path on the Day on which You resurrect the people.

segments.arabic: وَ اجْعَلْ أَوَّلَ يَوْمِي هَذَا صَلَاحاً وَ أَوْسَطَهُ فَلَاحاً وَ آخِرَهُ نَجَاحاً بِرَحْمَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa aj’al awwala yawmi hadha salah wa awsatahu falah wa akhirahu najah birahmatika
segments.translation: And please establish the beginning of this day for my improvement, its middle for my prosperity and its end for my success by Your Mercy.

segments.arabic: فَإِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَهُ وَ خَيْرَ أَهْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: fa’inni as’aluka khayrahu wa khayra ahlihi
segments.translation: I ask You for its goodness and the goodness of its people.

segments.arabic: وَ أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّهِ وَ شَرِّ أَهْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa a’udhu bika min sharrihi wa sharri ahlihi
segments.translation: I take refuge in You from its evil and the wickedness of its people,

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ سَمْعِهِ وَ بَصَرِهِ وَ يَدِهِ وَ رِجْلِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa min sam’ihi wa basarihi wa yadihi wa rijlihi
segments.translation: its hearing, sight,men! And withhold it from me.

segments.arabic: وَ كُنْ لِي مِنْهُ حَاجِزاً عَزَّ جَارُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa kun li minhu hajizan azza jaruka
segments.translation: Anyone under Your Protection is honored and Glorious

segments.arabic: وَ جَلَّ ثَنَاؤُكَ وَ لَا إِلَهَ غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: wa jalla thana’uka wa la ilaha ghayruka
segments.translation: and Sublime is Your praise. There is no God but You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَرْزُقَنِي مَ وَاهِبَ الدُّعَاءِ فِي دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلَاةٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as’aluka an tarzuqani mawahiba al-du’a’i fi duburi kulli salatin
segments.translation: O‟ my God! I ask You to grant me the benefits of supplications after every prayer.

segments.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ يَوْمِي هَذَا وَ فَتْحَهُ
segments.transliteration: wa as’aluka khayra yawmi hadha wa fathahu
segments.translation: I ask You to grant me the best of today,

segments.arabic: وَ رُشْدَهُ وَ بُشْرَاهُ وَ نَصْرَهُوَ نُورَهُ وَ هُدَاهُ
segments.transliteration: wa rushdahu wa bushrahu wa nasrahuwa nurahu wa hudaahu
segments.translation: plus victory, success, light, guidance, development and glad tidings.

segments.arabic: أَصْبَحْتُ بِاللَّهِ الَّذِي‌ لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْ‌ءٌ مُمْتَنِعاً وَ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ الَّتِي لَا تُرَامُ وَ لَا تُضَامُ مُعْتَصِماً
segments.transliteration: asbahtu billahi alladhi laysa kamithlihi shay’un mumtani’un wa bi’izzati allahi allati la turamu wa la tudamu mu’tasiman
segments.translation: I made it to the morning by God Whose like is not found at all.I adhere to God‟s Honor which cannot fail or and be violated

segments.arabic: وَ بِسُلْطَانِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي لَا يُقْهَرُ وَ لَا يُغْلَبُ عَائِذاً مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ وَ ذَرَأَ وَ بَرَأَ
segments.transliteration: Wa bisultanillahi alladhee la yuqharu wa la yughlabu 'a’idhan min sharri ma khalaqa wa dhara’a wa bara’a
segments.translation: I take refuge in God‟s Dominion that cannot be overpowered or defeated from the evils of what He has created, designed and developed;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا يُكَنُّ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ يَخْرُجُ بِالنَّهَارِ وَ شَرِّ مَا يَخْرُجُ بِاللَّيْلِ وَ يُكَنُّ بِالنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri ma yukannu billayli wa yakhruju bin nahari wa sharri ma yakhruju billayli wa yukannu bin nahari
segments.translation: from the evils of what is hidden at nights and comes out during the days; from the evils of what comes out at night and hides in the daytime;

segments.arabic: وَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْجِنِّ وَ الْإِنْسِ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ ذِي سُلْطَانٍ أَوْ غَيْرِهِ وَ مِنْ شَرِّ كُلِّ دَابَّةٍ هُوَ آخِذٌ بِناصِيَتِها إِنَّ رَبِّي عَلى‌ صِراطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ‌
segments.transliteration: Wa min sharri al jinni wa al insi wa min sharri kulli dhi sultanin aw ghayrihi wa min sharri kulli dabbatin huwa akhidhun binasiyatiha inna rabbi ala siratin mustaqim
segments.translation: from the evils of genies and mankind; from the evils of all that seek to rule and others; and from the evils of all animals.You have control over as indeed my Lord is on the Straight Path.”

duas.title: Salawat
duas.description:
Recite Regular salwat minimum 100 times a day<hr>
This special salwat is recommended for all days.

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ وَمَلاَئِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَىٰ ٱلنَّبِيِّ
segments.transliteration: inna allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna `ala alnnabiyyi
segments.translation: Verily, Allah and His angels send blessings to the Prophet.

segments.arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ آمَنُوٱ صَلُّوٱ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوٱ تَسْلِيماً
segments.transliteration: ya ayyuha alladhina amanu sallu `alayhi wa sallmu tasliman
segments.translation: O you who believe, Call for Divine blessings on him and salute him with a becoming salutation.

segments.transliteration: labbayka ya rabbi wa sa`dayka wa subhanaka
segments.translation: Here I am at Your service, my Lord! Doing that which pleases You, and glory be to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: wa barik `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: and send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَمَا صَلَّيْتَ وَبَارَكْتَ عَلَىٰ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَآلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
segments.transliteration: kama sallayta wa barakta `ala ibrahima wa ali ibrahima
segments.translation: just as You have blessed and conferred benedictions upon (Prophet) Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
You are verily worthy of all praise and full of all glory.

segments.transliteration: allahumma irham muhammadan wa ala muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) have mercy upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: kama rahimta ibrahima wa ala ibrahima
segments.translation: just as You had mercy upon (Prophet) Abraham and the Household of Abraham.
You are verily worthy of all praise and full of all glory.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ سَلِّمْ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma sallim `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send peace upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: كَمَا سَلَّمْتَ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِي ٱلْعَالَمِينَ
segments.translation: just as You sent peace upon Noah among all the creatures.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱمْنُنْ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma imnun `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) confer favors on Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
just as You conferred a favor upon (Prophets) Moses and Aaron.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا شَرَّفْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin kama sharraftana bihi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad just as You have honored us by him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ كَمَا هَدَيْتَنَا بِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin kama hadaytana bihi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad just as You have guided us through him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.arabic: وَٱبْعَثْهُ مَقَاماً مَحْمُوداً يَغْبِطُهُ بِهِ ٱلأَوَّلُونَ وَٱلآخِرُونَ
segments.transliteration: wab`athhu maqaman mahmudan yaghbituhu bihi al-awwaluna wal-akhiruna
segments.translation: and send his a praiseworthy standing due to which all the past and the coming generations shall covet him.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا طَلَعَتْ شَمْسٌ أَوْ غَرَبَتْ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama tala`at shamsun aw gharabat
segments.translation: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever the sun rises and sets.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا طَرَفَتْ عَيْنٌ أَوْ بَرَقَتْ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama tarafat `aynun aw baraqat
segments.translation: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever an eye twinkles or glitters.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا ذُكِرَ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama dhukira alssalamu
segments.translation: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever peace is mentioned.

segments.arabic: عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ كُلَّمَا سَبَّحَ ٱللَّهَ مَلَكٌ أَوْ قَدَّسَهُ
segments.transliteration: `ala muhammadin wa alihi alssalamu kullama sabbaha allaha malakun aw qaddasahu
segments.translation: Upon Muhammad and his Household be peace whenever an angel glorifies or exalts Allah.

segments.arabic: السَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلأَوَّلِينَ
segments.transliteration: alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-awwalina
segments.translation: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household among the past generations.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi al-akhirina
segments.translation: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household among the last generations.

segments.arabic: وَٱلسَّلاَمُ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِهِ فِي ٱلدُّنْيَا وَٱلآخِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `ala muhammadin wa alihi fi alddunya wal-akhirati
segments.translation: Peace be upon Muhammad and his Household in this world and in the Hereafter.
O Allah, Lord of the Holy Town,
Lord of the Rukn (Corner of Ka`bah) and the Maqam (Standing-place near Ka`bah),
and Lord of legality and sanctuary,
(please do) convey our greetings to Muhammad, Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ أَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً مِنَ ٱلْبَهَاءِ وَٱلنَّضْرَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma a`ti muhammadan min albaha'i walnnadrati
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) grant Muhammad brilliance, bloom,
delight, honor, happiness, right of intervention,
(exalted) rank, (exalted) position, nobility, elevation,
and right of intercession before You on the Resurrection Day,

segments.arabic: أَفْضَلَ مَا تُعْطِي أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: afdala ma tu`ti ahadan min khalqika
segments.translation: in the best way You have ever granted to any of Your creations.

segments.arabic: وَأَعْطِ مُحَمَّداً فَوْقَ مَا تُعْطِي ٱلْخَلاَئِقَ
segments.transliteration: wa a`ti muhammadan fawqa ma tu`ti alkhala'iqa
segments.translation: (Please) grant Muhammad more than what You grant Your creatures

segments.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْخَيْرِ أَضْعَافاً كَثِيرَةً لاَ يُحْصِيهَا غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: min alkhayri ad`afan kathiratan la yuhsiha ghayruka
segments.translation: with many folds of goodness that none can count save You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadin wa ali muhammadin
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

segments.transliteration: atyaba wa athara wa azka wa anma
segments.translation: with the most excellent, purest, most increasing, most growing,

segments.arabic: وَأَفْضَلَ مَا صَلَّيْتَ عَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنَ ٱلأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلآخِرِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa afdala ma sallayta `ala ahadin min al-awwalina wal-akhirina
segments.translation: and best blessings that You have ever conferred on anyone from the past and the coming generations

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ أَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ يَا أَرْحَمَ ٱلرَّاحِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala ahadin min khalqika ya arhama alrrahimina
segments.translation: and on anyone of Your created beings. O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيٍّ أَمِيرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali, the Commander of the Believers,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who provoke his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi
segments.translation: inflict double chastisement on any one who had a hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ فَاطِمَةَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ ٱلسَّلاَمُ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala fatimata binti nabiyyika muhammadin `alayhi wa alihi alssalamu
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Fatimah, the daughter of Your Prophet Muhammad, peace be upon him and his Household,
be the supporter of those who support her,
be the enemy of him who provoke her enmity,
inflict double chastisement on those who wronged her,
and curse those who injured Your Prophet as they injured her.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ وَٱلْحُسَيْنِ إِمَامَيِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani walhusayni imamay almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Hasan and al-Husayn, the two leaders of the Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports them,
be the enemy of any one who provoke their enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دِمَائِهِمَا
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi dima'ihima
segments.translation: and inflict double chastisement on any one who had a hand in the shedding of their blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ ٱلْحُسَيْنِ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi ibni alhusayni imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn al-Husayn, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ja`fari bni muhammadin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Ja`far ibn Muhammad, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُوسَىٰ بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala musa bni ja`farin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Musa ibn Ja`far, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi
segments.translation: and inflict double chastisement upon any one who had hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُوسَىٰ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi bni musa imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn Musa, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,

segments.arabic: وَضَاعِفِ ٱلْعَذَابَ عَلَىٰ مَنْ شَرِكَ فِي دَمِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa da`if al`adhaba `ala man sharika fi damihi
segments.translation: and inflict double chastisement upon any one who had a hand in the shedding of his blood.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala muhammadi bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Muhammad ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ عَلِيِّ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala `aliyyi bni muhammadin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to `Ali ibn Muhammad, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَسَنِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alhasani bni `aliyyin imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Hasan ibn `Ali, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and inflict double chastisement upon any one who wronged him.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْخَلَفِ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ إِمَامِ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alkhalafi min ba`dihi imami almuslimina
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to the Successor after him, the leader of Muslims,
be the supporter of any one who supports him,
be the enemy of any one who invokes his enmity,
and expedite his Relief.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ ٱلْقَاسِمِ وَٱلطَّاهِرِ ٱبْنَيْ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala alqasimi walttahiri ibnay nabiyyika
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to al-Qasim and al-Tahir, the two sons of Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ رُقَيَّةَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Ruqayyah, the daughter of Your Prophet
and curse those who injured Your Prophet through wronging her.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىٰ أُمِّ كُلْثُومَ بِنْتِ نَبِيِّكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli `ala ummi kulthuma binti nabiyyika
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) send blessings to Umm-Kulthum, the daughter of Your Prophet
and curse those who injured Your Prophet through wronging her.
O Allah, (please do) send blessings to the offspring of Your Prophet.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱخْلُفْ نَبِيَّكَ فِي أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ukhluf nabiyyaka fi ahli baytihi
segments.translation: O Allah, (please) be the representative of Your Prophet among his Household.
O Allah, (please do) grant them power in the land.
O Allah, (please do) include us with their troop, their aides,

segments.arabic: وَأَنْصَارِهِمْ عَلَىٰ ٱلْحَقِّ فِي ٱلسِّرِّ وَٱلْعَلانِيَةِ
segments.transliteration: wa ansarihim `ala alhaqqi fi alssirri wal`alaniyati
segments.translation: and their supporters on confirming the truth secretly and openly.

segments.transliteration: allahumma utlub bidhahlihim wa witrihim wa dima'ihim
segments.translation: O Allah, (please do) retaliate upon those who wronged and slew them, and those who shed their blood.

segments.arabic: وَكُفَّ عَنَّا وَعَنْهُمْ وَعَنْ كُلِّ مُؤْمِنٍ وَمُؤْمِنَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa kuffa `anna wa `anhum wa `an kulli mu'minin wa mu'minatin
segments.translation: And (please) save us, them, and every believing man and women
the evil of all tyrants and transgressors,

segments.transliteration: wa kulli dabbatin anta akhidhun binasiyatiha
segments.translation: and every living creature that You hold it by its forelock.

segments.transliteration: innaka ashaddu ba'san wa ashaddu tankilan
segments.translation: Verily, You are the strongest in prowess and the strongest to give an exemplary punishment.
O my means in troubles!
O my Companion in hardships!
O Provider of my amenities!
O utmost of my desires!
It is You Who conceals my defects,
Who relieves my apprehensions,
and Who overlooks my slips.
So, (please do) forgive my sin.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَدْعُوكَ لِهَمٍّ لاَ يُفَرِّجُهُ غَيْرُكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni ad`uka lihammin la yufarrijuhu ghayruka
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You about a grief that none can relieve save You,

segments.transliteration: wa lirahmatin la tunalu illa bika
segments.translation: for mercy that cannot be attained except through You,

segments.transliteration: wa likarbin la yakshifuhu illa anta
segments.translation: about hardship from which none can rescue except You,

segments.transliteration: wa liraghbatin la tublaghu illa bika
segments.translation: for desire that cannot be obtained except by You,

segments.transliteration: wa lihajatin la yaqdiha illa anta
segments.translation: and for a need that none can settle save You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَكَمَا كَانَ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ مَا أَذِنْتَ لِي بِهِ مِنْ مَسْأَلَتِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fakama kana min sha'nika ma adhinta li bihi min mas'alatika
segments.translation: O Allah, just as You have decided to allow me to pray You
and had mercy upon me through allowing me to refer to You,

segments.arabic: فَلْيَكُنْ مِنْ شَأْنِكَ سَيِّدِي ٱلإِجَابَةُ لِي فِيمَا دَعَوْتُكَ
segments.transliteration: falyakun min sha'nika sayyidi al-ijabatu li fima da`awtuka
segments.translation: so also, please, my Master, decide to respond to me in what I have prayed You for,
confer upon me the favors for which I have hoped You,
and grant me redemption from that against which I have resorted to You.

segments.arabic: فَإِنْ لَمْ أَكُنْ أَهْلاً أَنْ أَبْلُغَ رَحْمَتَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'in lam akun ahlan an ablugha rahmataka
segments.translation: But if I do not deserve to attain Your mercy,

segments.arabic: فَإِنَّ رَحْمَتَكَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَبْلُغَنِي وَتَسَعَنِي
segments.transliteration: fa'inna rahmataka ahlun an tablughani wa tasa`ani
segments.translation: then, Your mercy is too wide to avoid including and covering me.

segments.transliteration: wa in lam akun lil-ijabati ahlan
segments.translation: If I do not deserve Your response,
then, You are the worthiest of granting favors
and Your mercy has covered all things.
So, let Your mercy include me, O my God.
O All-generous! I beseech You in the name of Your Noble Face

segments.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin wa ahli baytihi
segments.translation: to bless Muhammad and his Household,
relieve my grief,
release me from my hardship and agony,
have mercy upon me out of Your mercy,
and confer on me with Your favor.
You are verily the Hearer of prayers, the Nigh, and the Responding.

duas.reference: 1 Muqniah, 324-329, b 15. Tusi’s Misbah, 616. Tahdhib, iii, 115. Iqbal, 93, thence in Bihar, xcv, 105, b 6. Kafcami’s Misbah, 625. Balad, 227.

duas.title: Tasbih
duas.description: Recite this tasbih 100 times each day(ref Muqniah of Shaikh Mufid)

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ الضَّارِّ النَّافِعِ, - سُبْحَانَ الْقَاضِي بِالْحَقِّ ,- سُبْحَانَ الْعَلِيِّ الْاَعْلَى , -سُبْحَانَهُ وَ بِحَمْدِهِ , -سُبْحَانَهُ وَ تَعَالَى
segments.transliteration: Subhana adh-Dharri an-Nafi, Subhana al-Qadi bil-Haqq, Subhana al-'Aliyy al-A'la Subhanahu wa bihamdihi,Subhanahu wa Ta'ala
segments.translation: Glory be to the One Who causes harm and benefit, Glory be to the One Who judges with truth.Glory be to the Most High, the Exalted.Glory be to Him and His is the praise.Glory be to Him, the Exalted.

duas.title: 10 Tasbih
duas.description: Following glorification is recommended for all days of the month of Ramadan. It consists of ten parts; each part comprises ten phrases of glorification of Almighty Allah

segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلسَّمِيعِ ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ شَيْءٌ أَسْمَعَ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alssami`i alladhi laysa shay'un asma`a minhu
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the All-hearing; there is nothing is more hearing than He is.

segments.arabic: يَسْمَعُ مِنْ فَوْقِ عَرْشِهِ مَا تَحْتَ سَبْعِ أَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: yasma`u min fawqi `arshihi ma tahta sab`i aradina
segments.translation: He hears from above His Throne what is under seven layers of the earth.

segments.arabic: وَيَسْمَعُ مَا فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa yasma`u ma fi zulumati albarri walbahri
segments.translation: He hears that which is in the murk of lands and oceans.
He hears the moaning and the complaints.
He hears the secret and what is more veiled than secrets.
He hears the inspirations of hearts.
No sound can ever deafen His hearing.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْبَصِيرِ ٱلَّذِي لَيْسَ شَيْءٌ أَبْصَرَ مِنْهُ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi albasiri alladhi laysa shay'un absara minhu
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the All-seeing; there is nothing more seeing than He is.

segments.arabic: يُبْصِرُ مِنْ فَوْقِ عَرْشِهِ مَا تَحْتَ سَبْعِ أَرَضِينَ
segments.transliteration: yubsiru min fawqi `arshihi ma tahta sab`i aradina
segments.translation: He sees from above His Throne what is under seven layers of the earth.

segments.arabic: وَيُبْصِرُ مَا فِي ظُلُمَاتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ
segments.transliteration: wa yubsiru ma fi zulumati albarri walbahri
segments.translation: He sees that which is in the murk of lands and oceans.
Visions cannot comprehend Him.
He comprehends all visions.
He is the Knower of subtleties, the Aware.
Darkness cannot screen His sight.
None can hide from Him behind any screen.
No wall can ever prevent Him from seeing.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَغِيبُ عَنْهُ بَرٌّ وَلاَ بَحْرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la yaghibu `anhu barrun wa la bahrun
segments.translation: No land and no ocean can ever be absent from Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَكُنُّ مِنْهُ جَبَلٌ مَا فِي أَصْلِهِ وَلاَ قَلْبٌ مَا فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakunnu minhu jabalun ma fi aslihi wa la qalbun ma fihi
segments.translation: No mountain can ever conceal its root from Him or conceals its center from Him.

segments.transliteration: wa la janbun ma fi qalbihi
segments.translation: No side of it can conceal its center from Him.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَسْتَتِرُ مِنْهُ صَغِيرٌ وَلاَ كَبِيرٌ
segments.transliteration: wa la yastatiru minhu saghirun wa la kabirun
segments.translation: Neither big nor small thing can ever hide from Him.

segments.transliteration: wa la yastakhfi minhu saghirun lisigharihi
segments.translation: No tiny thing can ever be unseen by Him due to its smallness.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَخْفَىٰ عَلَيْهِ شَيْءٌ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَلاَ فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: wa la yakhfa `alayhi shay'un fi al-ardi wa la fi alssama'i
segments.translation: Surely, nothing is hidden from Him in the earth or in the heavens.

segments.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي يُصَوِّرُكُمْ فِي ٱلأَرْحَامِ كَيْفَ يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: huwa alladhi yusawwirukum fi al-arhami kayfa yasha'u
segments.translation: He it is Who fashions you in the wombs as pleases Him.

segments.arabic: لاَ إِلٰهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ
segments.transliteration: la ilaha illa huwa al`azizu alhakimu
segments.translation: There is no god save Him; the Almighty, the Wise.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُنْشِئُ ٱلسَّحَابَ ٱلثِّقَالَ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi yunshi'u alssahaba alththiqala
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah Who raises the heavy clouds.

segments.arabic: وَيُسَبِّحُ ٱلرَّعْدُ بِحَمْدِهِ وَٱلْمَلاَئِكَةُ مِنْ خِيفَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yusabbihu alrra`du bihamdihi walmala'ikatu min khifatihi
segments.translation: The thunder declares His glory with His praise, and the angels too for awe of Him;

segments.arabic: وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلصَّوَاعِقَ فَيُصِيبُ بِهَا مَنْ يَشَاءُ
segments.transliteration: wa yursilu alssawa`iqa fayusibu biha man yasha'u
segments.translation: and He sends the thunderbolts and smites with them whom He pleases.

segments.arabic: وَيُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَاحَ بُشْراً بَيْنَ يَدَيْ رَحْمَتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa yursilu alrriyaha bushran bayna yadai rahmatihi
segments.translation: He sends forth the winds bearing good news before His mercy.

segments.transliteration: wa yunazzilu alma'a min alssama'i bikalimatihi
segments.translation: He causes water to descend from the heavens through His Word.
He causes plants to grow out of His power.
Leaves fall down by His knowledge.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يَعْزُبُ عَنْهُ مِثْقَالُ ذَرَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi la ya`zubu `anhu mithqalu dharratin
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah: not the weight of an atom becomes absent from Him,

segments.transliteration: fi al-ardi wa la fi alssama'i
segments.translation: in the heavens or in the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَصْغَرُ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْبَرُ
segments.transliteration: wa la asgharu min dhalika wa la akbaru
segments.translation: and neither less than that nor greater,
but (all) is in a clear book.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا تَحْمِلُ كُلُّ أُنْثَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma tahmilu kullu untha
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah Who knows what every female bears,

segments.transliteration: wa ma taghidu al-arhamu wa ma tazdadu
segments.translation: and that of which the wombs fall short of completion and that in which they increase;
and there is a measure with Him of everything.
The knower of the unseen and the seen, the Great, the Most High.

segments.arabic: سَوَاءٌ مِنْكُمْ مَنْ أَسَرَّ ٱلْقَوْلَ وَمَنْ جَهَرَ بِهِ
segments.transliteration: sawa'un minkum man asarra alqawla wa man jahara bihi
segments.translation: Alike to Him among you is he who conceals his words and he who speaks them openly,

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ هُوَ مُسْتَخْفٍ بِٱللَّيْلِ وَسَارِبٌ بِٱلنَّهَارِ
segments.transliteration: wa man huwa mustakhfin billayli wa saribun bilnnahari
segments.translation: and he who hides himself by night and who goes forth by day.

segments.arabic: لَهُ مُعَقِّبَاتٌ مِنْ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِ
segments.transliteration: lahu mu`aqqibatun min bayni yadayhi wa min khalfihi
segments.translation: For his sake, there are angels following one another, before him and behind him,
who guard him by Allah's commandment.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يُمِيتُ ٱلأَحْيَاءَ وَيُحْيِي ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi yumitu al-ahya'a wa yuhyi almawta
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah Who causes the alive to die and restores the dead to life.

segments.transliteration: wa ya`lamu ma tanqusu al-ardu minhum
segments.translation: He knows indeed what the earth diminishes of them

segments.arabic: وَيُقِرُّ فِي ٱلأَرْحَامِ مَا يَشَاءُ إِلَىٰ أَجَلٍ مُسَمَّىٰ
segments.transliteration: wa yuqirru fi al-arhami ma yasha'u ila ajalin musamman
segments.translation: and He causes what We please to stay in the wombs till an appointed time.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Glory be to Allah, Master of the Kingdom!
You give the kingdom to whomsoever You please
and take away the kingdom from whomsoever You please,
and You exalt whom You please
and abase whom You please
in You hand is the good.
Surely, You have power over all things.
You make the night to pass into the day
and You make the day to pass into the night,
and You bring forth the living from the dead
and You bring forth the dead from the living,

segments.transliteration: wa tarzuqu man tasha'u bighayri hisabin
segments.translation: and You give sustenance to whom You please without measure.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي عِنْدَهُ مَفَاتِحُ ٱلْغَيْبِ
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah with Whom are the keys of the unseen treasures.
None knows them but He.

segments.transliteration: wa ya`lamu ma fi albarri walbahri
segments.translation: He knows what is in the land and the sea,

segments.arabic: وَمَا تَسْقُطُ مِنْ وَرَقَةٍ إِلاَّ يَعْلَمُهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma tasqutu min waraqatin illa ya`lamuha
segments.translation: and there falls not a leaf but He knows it,

segments.transliteration: wa la habbatin fi zulumati al-ardi
segments.translation: nor a grain in the darkness of the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ رَطْبٍ وَلاَ يَابِسٍ إِلاَّ فِي كِتَابٍ مُبِينٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la ratbin wa la yabisin illa fi kitabin mubinin
segments.translation: nor anything green nor dry but it is all in a clear book.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي لاَ يُحْصِي مِدْحَتَهُ ٱلْقَائِلُونَ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi la yuhsi midhatahu alqa'iluna
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah. No speaker can ever declare His actual praiseworthiness.

segments.transliteration: wa la yajzi bi-ala'ihi alshshakiruna al`abiduna
segments.translation: All the thankful ones and worshippers cannot thank Him adequately for His (innumerable) bounties.

segments.arabic: وَهُوَ كَمَا قَالَ وَفَوْقَ مَا نَقُولُ
segments.transliteration: wa huwa kama qala wa fawqa ma naqulu
segments.translation: He is as same as He has described Himself and above whatever we say about Him.

segments.arabic: وَاللَّهُ سُبْحَانَهُ كَمَا أَثْنَىٰ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِ
segments.translation: Allah, the Glorified, is as same as He has praised Himself, by saying:

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلاَّ بِمَا شَاءَ
segments.transliteration: wa la yuhituna bishay'in min `ilmihi illa bima sha'a
segments.translation: “They cannot comprehend anything out of His knowledge except what He pleases.
His knowledge extends over the heavens and the earth,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَؤُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِيُّ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
segments.transliteration: wa la ya'uduhu hifzuhuma wa huwa al`aliyyu al`azimu
segments.translation: and the preservation of them both tires Him not, and He is the Most High, the Great.”
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah Who knows that which goes down into the earth and that which comes out of it,

segments.arabic: وَمَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa ma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha
segments.translation: and knows that which comes down from the heaven and that which goes up to it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ مَا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu ma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha
segments.translation: That which goes down into the earth does not occupy Him

segments.arabic: عَمَّا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: `amma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha
segments.translation: from that which comes down from the heavens and that which goes up to it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ مَا يَنْزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu ma yanzilu min alssama'i wa ma ya`ruju fiha
segments.translation: That which comes down from the heavens and that which goes up to it does not occupy Him

segments.arabic: عمَّا يَلِجُ فِي ٱلأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا
segments.transliteration: `mma yaliju fi al-ardi wa ma yakhruju minha
segments.translation: from that which goes down into the earth and that which comes out of it.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ عِلْمُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ عِلْمِ شَيْءٍ
segments.translation: The knowledge of anything does not occupy Him from the knowledge of something else.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ يَشْغَلُهُ خَلْقُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ خَلْقِ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la yashghaluhu khalqu shay'in `an khalqi shay'in
segments.translation: The creation of anything does not occupy Him from the creation of something else.

segments.arabic: وَلاَ حِفْظُ شَيْءٍ عَنْ حِفْظِ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa la hifzu shay'in `an hifzi shay'in
segments.translation: The preservation of anything does not occupy Him from the preservation of something else.
Nothing is equal to Him.
Nothing is His match.
Nothing is like Him.
He is the All-hearing, the All-seeing.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.
Glory be to Allah, the Originator of the heavens and the earth,
the Maker of the angels, messengers flying on wings,
two, and three, and four.
He increases in creation what He pleases.

segments.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
segments.translation: Surely, Allah has power over all things.

segments.arabic: مَا يَفْتَحِ ٱللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِنْ رَحْمَةٍ فَلاَ مُمْسِكَ لَهَا
segments.transliteration: ma yaftah allahu lilnnasi min rahmatin fala mumsika laha
segments.translation: Whatever Allah grants to men of His mercy, there is none to withhold it,

segments.arabic: وَمَا يُمْسِكْ فَلاَ مُرْسِلَ لَهُ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa ma yumsik fala mursila lahu min ba`dihi
segments.translation: and what He withholds there is none to send it forth after that.
He is the Mighty, the Wise.
Glory be to Allah, the Shaper of breathes.
Glory be to Allah, the Fashioner.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all pairs.
Glory be to Allah, the Maker of darkness and light.
Glory be to Allah the Causer of the grain and the stone to germinate.
Glory be to Allah, the Creator of all things.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ خَالِقِ مَا يُرَىٰ وَمَا لاَ يُرَىٰ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi khaliqi ma yura wa ma la yura
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah, the Creator of the seen and the unseen.
Glory be to Allah as much as the ink of His Words.
Glory be to Allah, the Lord of the worlds.

segments.arabic: سُبْحَانَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِي يَعْلَمُ مَا فِي ٱلسَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي ٱلأَرْضِ
segments.transliteration: subhana allahi alladhi ya`lamu ma fi alssamawati wa ma fi al-ardi
segments.translation: Glory be to Allah Who knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth.

segments.arabic: مَا يَكُونُ مِنْ نَجْوَىٰ ثَلاثَةٍ إِلاَّ هُوَ رَابِعُهُمْ
segments.transliteration: ma yakunu min najwa thalathatin illa huwa rabi`uhum
segments.translation: Nowhere is there a secret counsel between three persons but He is the fourth of them,

segments.transliteration: wa la khamsatin illa huwa sadisuhum
segments.translation: nor (between) five but He is the sixth of them,

segments.arabic: وَلاَ أَدْنَىٰ مِنْ ذٰلِكَ وَلاَ أَكْثَرَ إِلاَّ هُوَ مَعَهُمْ أَيْنَمَا كَانُوَٱ
segments.transliteration: wa la adna min dhalika wa la akthara illa huwa ma`ahum aynama kanu
segments.translation: nor less than that nor more but He is with them wherever they are.

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ يُنَبِّئُهُمْ بِمَا عَمِلُوٱ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيَامَةِ
segments.translation: Then, He will inform them of what they did on the Day of Resurrection.
Surely, Allah is Cognizant of all things.

_index_meta.title: Duas to be recited during the day on each day of the month of Ramadan
